The series is about a company president who gets trapped in a smartphone due to a suspicious incident, and an unemployed young man whose life changes after picking up the strange smartphone.
A sudden tragedy brings the wife of an assemblyman out of her private life and forces her to confront family secrets and her own troubling past.
Follows the romance between a freshman college student and an established female pop idol.

Five executives who worked for Nasty Corporation are turned into animals by Father Time. They have to fix all the environmental disasters they've caused in return for gems so that they may become humans again.
Four men and women working at the same bank get entangled in a complicated romance as they discover how far they're willing to go for love.
Ye So-rang, a fraudulent match-maker insisting she can summon the deceased crown princess, shows up to King Lee Heon who proclaimed a ban on marriage since he lost his wife 7 years ago.

Beating Heart (aka Six Love Stories) is a 12 episode Korean TV drama that revolves around the life of a somewhat ordinary modern family. Broken down into 6 two part episodes (each helmed by a different writer and director), this series weaves together the individual lives and loves of each of the family members into a coherent and effective story.

Sung Mi Soo (Uee) grows up in a poor but cheerful household and becomes interested in golf when she sees a TV broadcast of the real life LPGA Hall of Fame golfer Pak Se-ri's miraculous shot from the water at the 18th hole of the 1998 U.S. Women's Open to stay in the playoff (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=cKRYSCo1d9I at 1h22m) which she then won with a 20 foot birdie on the 20th playoff hole. Mi-soo then finds a golf club that belongs to her mother, Jo Kyung-sook (Yoon Yoo-sun), a former caddie. Min Hae-ryung (Lee Da-hee) grows up being trained to be a champion golfer by her strict single mother, Min Se-hwa (Oh Hyun-kyung), the President and owner of a prestigious golf club, with whom she clashes repeatedly because her mother refuses to tell her about her father. The story follows their progress, in golf and in life, as they fall under the influence of former professional golfer John Lee (Lee Yong-woo).

Mi-soo struggles at first. Her family has little money. She enters a tournament and, with the help of her exceptional distance ability, leads after the first day, only to have her game fall apart when she tries to play out of a thick forest instead of taking a drop. But her talent gets recognized and she ends up being taught by the Master, an unconventional Svengali, a Korean-speaking foreigner known as "Fabian", played by Robert Holley, who teaches her critical skills not on a golf course but at the top of a mountain where he lives.

Hae-ryung has success, with a shorter but highly accurate game. She eventually meets her father, Woo Joon-mo (Kim Jong-Jin), a successful greens keeper who has returned from abroad and comes to work at the club (although at first, Hae-ryung's mother does not realize that it is him because he is using his western name, Stephen Woo). Her father teaches her to read a green by walking it with bare feet and this serves her well at a critical point. She leads a tournament and then deliberately implodes on the final green to protest her mother's behavior and announce publicly that she has found her father.

Mi-soo's father ends up signing on as a sailor on a cargo ship, where he gets injured and (temporarily) loses his memory and begins to behave erratically. Mi-soo feels guilty for his feeling compelled to take on this dangerous work. Her mother takes a job in the kitchen of the golf club, where she meets and eventually befriends President Min, who leans on her for advice on how to develop the warm relationship with her daughter that she had never had.

John Lee guides both young women to success in golf, including both being nominated as rookies of the year (which Mi-soo wins although she does not attend the ceremony). All this is complicated by the machinations of master sports gambler Jae Park (Choi Il-hwa) that must be defeated but not before Park's henchmen murder the Master. A highlight is an unconventional private match between Mi-soo and a male ringer, promoted by Park. Mi-soo wins the match with a miracle shot, known as the "Fabian", in which she hits a ball from the bottom of the cliff and causes it to slice back on to the top of the cliff, from which position she chips in.

A love triangle develops between the three leads, with Hae-ryung trying to force the issue, since she had been John Lee's first love. After Park's defeat, aided by the betrayal of his top aide, the final episodes switch from golf to the resolution of Hae-ryung's relationship with her mother as well as the romance among the three leads and also wrap up the romantic affairs of Hae-ryung's mother, who is having an affair with her right hand man, Danny Choi (Park Sung-woong) and Mi-soo's brother, who is in love with Mi-soo's best friend Lee Gong-sook (Yoo In-na), both of whom work at the golf club. During the course of these events, John Lee gets seriously injured in a car accident while driving Mi-soo back from the airport, from which she was about to leave the country to get away from what she found to be an intolerable situation. After getting out of hospital, he hides away to disguise from the two women that he can no longer walk properly. Eventually, Mi-soo finds him and, sacrificing her feelings, gets him back together with Hae-ryung.
A romantic comedy drama about angst-ridden 18-year-old Kang Kyung-joon, who finds himself trapped in the body of 30-year-old pediatrician Seo Yoon-jae.

A brilliant neurosurgeon falls into a time portal and lands in 1860 Korea. Without his modern medical tools, he must figure out a way back to the present day, saving a few Joseon-era people along the way.
The story revolves around two young soldiers, the woman they both love, and the Korean war that tears all their lives apart.

Hana is a shy manga artist who wants to tell the 60 year love story of her neighbors through her drawings. While uncovering details about the lives of her neighbors, Hana discovers more about herself, love, and life.
A Beautiful Love story Between a man (Yoon Ho-Sang) Facing death and a Women (Na Ha-Na)who Loves money more than anything.

After receiving an anonymous letter stating that someone would die, eight students at the elite boarding school decided to remain at school for the 8 days of winter break. To accompany them, a teacher is forced to remain.

Young Vampire prince, from Vampire planet visits earth to see live performance of his favorite Idol contender, and remains stuck there with his three trusted and loyal servants. He then decides to join competition himself.
A Korean-American hotel executive returns to his birth country for work and finds himself drawn to a spirited hotel concierge, but his friend's vengeful ex-wife threatens their budding romance.

primary_title: Super Junior: The Last Man Standing
plot: Explore behind the scenes of SUPER JUNIOR and its members. A boy band with an unusual number of members that debuted on the music scene on November 6, 2005, making its mark in Asia
Three women struggle with one another as each vies for power in the royal court of the Joseon Dynasty.
Retired national team female handball player has become a Banchan take-out store owner in order to look after her family while she grapples with her daughter's tutor's many quirks.

Wi Mae Ri is the cheerful, pragmatic girl who finds herself reluctantly being set up in an arranged marriage by her father. In order to avoid it, she enlists help from an indie rocker Kang Moo Kyul who pretends to be her husband.
The quiet lives of three high school students with genetic superhuman abilities turn upside down when a mysterious organization starts to hunt them down one by one.

Kim Yeon Woo is an orthopedic doctor who takes up a new post at Taereung National Village, the training center for national Olympic athletes, after she is fired from her previous job. She becomes romantically involved with Park Ji Heon, a young judo athlete, and Lee Do Wook, the short-tempered, crippled director of the facility who is still haunted by the injury that had cut short his speed-skating career. This is further complicated by the presence of the swimming coach, Hee Young, who becomes her rival for the attentions of Do Wook.

Jejoongwon is the first modern hospital in Korea established in the Joseon era in 1885. Baek Do Yang is a nobleman who gives up his status to enter its ranks. Hwang Jung is a butcher's son who becomes a physician, while Seok Ran enters Jejoongwon as an interpreter but takes on medical training to become a doctor.

'Music Bank' is a South Korean music show featuring K-pop artists' performances to promote their latest songs and albums. The show airs weekly on KBS2 and also broadcasts around the world on KBS World.

primary_title: Save the Last Dance for Me
plot: Eun Soo, an unsophisticated but pure-hearted woman, runs a small resort with her father. Her ordinary life takes an unexpected turn when she meets a man who has lost all his memories.
An innocent man is betrayed by his wife who tries to kill him. He gets plastic surgery, assumes a new identity, and seeks vengeance with help from a woman.

primary_title: Look at My Shoulder, It's Dislocated
plot: Na Young Suk PD's ongoing 'New Journey To The West' mini series will be bringing viewers a brand new concept starting on October 23, centered around cast member Super Junior's Kyuhyun.
Chang Wook, who does not know how to cook, starts making food with love and care for his ex-wife, who has terminal colon cancer.
The one hour you have to save a person's life after a traumatic injury is what emergency physicians call "golden time."
Featuring breathtaking cinematography and gorgeous locations, The Princess's Man is a lush historical romance that captivated audiences in 2011.

Two soon-to-be step siblings grow close during their teen years, helping each other through family challenges. After high school, they part ways. Years later, they reunite alongside a cousin, rekindling unresolved emotions from their past.

'Welcome to NCT Universe', is a reality program where NCT Shotaro and Sung Chan become a guide for 'SM Rookies' who receives a mysterious invitation from 'NEO CITY' to experience everything about NCT. In addition, members of NCT 127, NCT DREAM, and WayV are known to have participated, raising expectations for what story they will tell.

Hwang Ji An is the top shoe designer in a major shoe company. She is in her 30s, successful and single. One night, she makes a horrible mistake and sleeps with Park Tae Gang, a good-looking new employee in her company, and she finds out she is pregnant. Ji An's hard-earned career and her stylish lifestyle threatens to implode as a result of her one-night-stand mistake. Will Ji An be forced to give up everything and live with the consequences of her mistake?
This drama tells the story of a TV series director Cha Yoon Hee and a surgeon Bang Gwi Nam after they get married. Things get complicated when Yoon Hee meets her unreasonable mother-in-law.
Two university students, diligent Hee Ram and carefree Ga In, are partnered for a mock dating assignment in their "Psychology of Love and Sex" class, despite their personality clashes.
Tells the story of people who believe that money is everything and people who believe that money is not everything.

Cha Seung Hyuk (Ryu Si Won) is used to the spotlight and loves being adored by fans and women. As a champion martial artist, he has it all - good looks, great athleticism and a winning record. Kang Sun Ah (Hong Soo Hyun) leads a much quieter life after being abandoned as a baby in front of a convent and raised by nuns. When she is rejected by her first love, Kim Hyun Chul (Kim Min Soo), she pledges to become a nun herself. But when Seung Hyuk meets Sun Ah, he falls in love with her. When she tells him that she could never be with a martial arts fighter, he gives it all up for her, winning national acclaim for his romanticism and making women swoon throughout Korea. The reputation wins Seung Hyuk major endorsement deals, and he soon makes enough money to open up a famous sports center. He marries Sun Ah, and they lead an idyllic married life for five years. Until, that is, Seung Hyuk becomes bored by it all. Then his former girlfriend, the mysterious and deliciously dangerous Oh Hyang Gi (Park Ji Yoon) comes back into Seung Hyuk's life, promising a much more exciting life than the blase one he shares with his angelic wife. Seung Hyuk decides to leave his wife for Hyang Gi. Meanwhile, the scorned Sun Ah also faces conflicting emotions when Hyun Chul comes back into her life, and the reason why he left her seven years earlier is revealed. Can her marriage be saved for does fate have other plans for her? "Goodbye Wife," also known as "Goodbye Dear Wife," is a 2012 South Korean drama series directed by Kim Pyung Joong.
Sung Dong-Il (Sung Dong-Il) and Jin Hee-Kyung (Jin Hee-Kyung) are a married couple. They run a boarding house near an airport and most of their guests work at the airport.
5th Republic is a controversial political drama about the Fifth Republic of South Korea, one of the most turbulent times in modern Korean history.
Hong Gil Dong the korean Robin Hood. Unsatisfied with the current custom of the Joseon Kingdom. Decided to change the world by himself with his friends and his lover.
Following the crew at the fictional company McCom, where they navigate the chaotic battlefield common to Korean start-ups.
A 22 episode Korean TV melodrama centered around the lives and loves of four people working their way up the corporate ladder.
It's about the life of Hye-na Kang, an heir to the Kang-san corporation and owner of the palace known as "Lady Castle".
One hundred contestants in top physical shape compete in a series of grueling challenges to claim the honor - and cash reward - as the last one standing.

primary_title: Time to Get Drunk with SUGA
plot: SUGA of BTS interviews a variety of guests about life and living, over drinks.
Drama tells the life of Kim Doo Han with fact and fiction.

A story depicting a war-like reunion romance between Ha Yeon Woo, a movie director who was once a promising prospect in Chungmuro, and Seong Woo Jae, a writer who disappeared from his first love due to past wounds.

Kwon Oh Joon is a swindler who falls for a widow with a 5 year old daughter, Jin Dal Rae. Dal Rae lives with her daughter and mother in law after her husband passes away. Oh Joon is a suave man who can talk women into doing anything.
Korean show dealing with the solutions to dangers of every-day accidents, hazards, and disasters.
A drama about what happens when a death god, Ggokdu who comes down to the earth every 99 years to punish humans, works as a visiting doctor
How much does your home life influence the person you become? Kim Jin Seo (Kim Hye Soo) and Mo Yoon Hee (Hwang Shin Hye) are high school classmates who have had very different upbringings.

primary_title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug & Cat Noir
original_title: Miraculous: Les aventures de Ladybug et Chat Noir
plot: Marinette and Adrien, two normal teens, transform into the superheroes Ladybug and Cat Noir when a mysterious evil threatens to destroy Paris.
The drama tells the story of the relative deprivation we all suffer, the thirst of our stomach aches, and our struggles to soothe our thirsts.

As South Korea's very first gay dating reality series, His Man brings together a group of eight hot, sexy, free and single gay men to a shared house where they are to live, interact and open up to each other in their quest for "true love."

The long-awaited sequel to Full House it's no-holds-barred in this second series about modern and unconventional romance. Feisty hapkido teacher Jang Man Ok fights her way to become the stylist of TAKE ONE, a popular idol group. Pretty boys Lee Tae Ik and Won Kang Hwi comprise the group, and although they have vastly different personalities, they both take a liking to Man Ok. What follows is a steamy, polyamorous love triangle. Man Ok is living the fantasy: dating an entire idol group at once!
Na Mi-roo (Yoon Jin-seo), a 29-year-old magazine writer, who takes on a new romance column and launches headlong into a project where she dates twelve men, one for each astrological sign of the year.

A story about a prince who receives a book about ghost stories containing all kinds of curses of life and feels that the curse is happening one by one,and a woman who became a wanted murdered who betrayed her marriage, and how they save each other from each other's fate.
The story of a taxi driver who grants the last wishes of ghosts.
Medical student Kang Ma-Ru is framed for a crime. Seeking revenge, he uses Seo Eun-Gi but realizes there are more important things in life.

A romance drama about a semi-human vampire named Seon Woo-hyeol, who failed to become a human by a day out of 100 years, and a woman Joo In-hae, who doesn't have a single human decency, starting to live together and finding true warmth.
The story of people who gather to occupy samples for different purposes after the last sample of the so-called 'Tyrant Program' disappears in a delivery accident.
A detective with an altruistic brain and a neuroscientist with an extraordinary brain. The two can't stand each other but must partner up to solve a crime involving a rare brain disease.
Driven by a personal tragedy, a pianist-turned-lawyer navigates the complex world of divorce - fighting for his clients to win by any means necessary.
A space station romantic comedy between space tourists and astronauts.

Facing hardships and contemplating suicide after a series of setbacks, a man is confronted by Death and tasked with experiencing death over and over again through 13 other lives to earn the chance to live.
A love-story between a noble woman and a mysterious man set in Joseon during the Qing invasion

A series of misunderstandings causes Lee Shin, the cocky leader of "The Stupid" and Lee Gyu-won, a student majoring in Traditional Korean Music to start on the wrong foot. Until she sees him performing live, and is immediately captivated.
A historical mystery-action drama set in the Joseon Dynasty following Kwon Soo-yeong who was thought to be dead. He is back but he seems to have lost his memory and is trying to find his identity
A woman thinks of revenge after her life halts at crossroads but instead starts empathizing with her mark. It's a melodrama of love, forgiveness, empathy and tragedies.
For an attorney who despises losing to men and an A-list actor who distrusts women, love means nothing - until they're forced to date each other.
A fantasy-romance drama about an unknown idol, Woo Yeon-woo, whose body was possessed by Rembrary, the god of this world.

primary_title: I Have Not Done My Best Yet
plot: Nam Geum Pil is a 44-year-old man who lives with his father and daughter. One day, he decides to quit his job in order to follow his dream: becoming a webtoonist.
It follows a woman who became the first female executive in her group to make her way to the highest position.

Kim Do-hyun (Jang Hyuk), smart and ambitious lawyer, was in relationship with Lee Jung-yeon (Lee Min-jung). The peaceful relationship soon ran into problem when Do-hyun was lured into the world of hedge fund and money greed.
Determined to provide a ray of light for those under her care, a young nurse navigates the world of mental health and the diverse stories surrounding it.
An office worker who is insecure about her looks becomes a masked internet personality by night until a chain of ill-fated events overtakes her life.

Yoo I-hwa, a housewife, inadvertently encounters money from VIP bank clients during her contract job, spiraling her into an irreversible descent despite her initially content life amidst her husband's indifference.
Hong Tae-ra leads a life envied by all, with a perfect husband and a lovely daughter. However, her life takes a turn when repressed memories resurface.
In order to pay off their debt, three daring youths jump into the money-lending business while confronting the rich and powerful who prey on the weak.
Fame. Money. Power. One young woman fights to become the next hottest celebrity in the glamorous yet scandalous world of influencers in Seoul.
A veterinarian with psychic powers, and a hot-blooded detective who fall in love with each other while solving minor crime cases in a small town in Mujin, Chungcheong-do.
The extrovert Gang Seol is hired by her aunt Jung at her girls' bar, Dickinson's Room. Despite their generational gap, they share the struggles of their respective love stories.

"Who is your partner?" When you take a look at the definition of 'Partner', it gives you synonyms such as colleague, sharer, spouse and accomplice. A partner is a person who is strongly associated with me; the one who knows me very well and stays by my side. The word 'Partner' takes a different meaning when it is used in a law firm. Partners are the people who survived the power struggle. They are executives who are on the top of the law firm pyramid. Enterprises are law firm's partners. Law firms fight each other to become a partner in the business. They struggle to be close to power and to become a slave of money. There are some lawyers who want to be the partners of commoners as well. They are willing to be the spokesperson for the underprivileged. It is a story about partner; the one who is going to stay by your side and fight together in front of law.
An accomplished fixer for a powerful business conglomerate jumps into politics to make a headstrong civil rights lawyer the next mayor of Seoul.

primary_title: In the Name of God: A Holy Betrayal
plot: This docuseries examining the chilling true stories of four Korean leaders claiming to be prophets exposes the dark side of unquestioning belief.
A drama about a strange and beautiful time travel between a news anchor and an ordinary office worker trapped in 1987.
Hee Jae is kind and considerate, Mi Na is the confident one; both are to host a podcast on tips on sex and romance however neither knows how to express themselves on these topics and feel lost.
A drama that tells the story of two men and women who consider themselves trash, loving themselves and even the environment around them.
An action drama in which a niece who lost her parents and grew up in the hands of an uncle who runs a shopping mall, faces a new truth after her uncle's sudden death.

Set in the 1990's, Park Ha Kyung teaches Korean literature at a high school. To escape her ordinary days, Park Ha Kyung decides to take one day trips on Saturdays. During her trips she walks around, eats different foods, and meets people.

A period drama set in a turbulent Republic of Korea from the 1980s to the 1990s. It contains the fierce life, revenge and conflict of young people who had to live after power and wealth regardless of means or means in wrong social values.
In Jeju, a spirited girl and a steadfast boy's island story blossoms into a lifelong tale of setbacks and triumphs, proving love endures across time.
The story of a reckless mother and a cool daughter living together without countermeasures.

Former lawyer Ku Do Han investigates unsolved crimes, piecing together clues from current cases. He's joined by reporter Cheon Na Yeon and con artist No Sang Cheon as they unravel the truth and seek justice.

The drama tells the story of a woman who sacrificed her life for her younger sister, but after losing her sister in a shocking accident, she enters a chaebol family with a desire for blood-red revenge.
In a world where criminals evade justice, citizens vote via text for the death penalty, executed by "Dog Mask" if over 50% agree.

A drama about a woman who loses her sight due to her husband and his lover and falls into 'Locked-In Syndrome' (conscious general paralysis) getting involved with an heiress who has everything and comes out for truth and revenge.

Succeeding 'Youn's Kitchen', Lee Seo Jin will be running a new franchise restaurant abroad that specializes in Korean street food. The show features fellow actors Lee, Jung Yu-mi, Park Seo-joon, Choi Woo-shik and world star BTS V.
A fusion historical drama that combines romance and legal heroes, and contains a fictional story based on the motif of Gyeongguk Daejeon.

A suspense drama depicting mothers engaged in a fierce social media battle to destroy each others' happiness for their own, to free themselves from oppression, hurt, and secrets, and regain their true selves.

Song Na-Young, a 29-old-single mom, goes through the baby care with help of three best friends of her late husband. Na-Young, born with natural optimism and somewhat recklessness, just lost her husband and depends on three distinctive characters. Han Su-Hyung is a competent fund manager and most successful among friends, but most narrow-minded and stingy. Gwanghui is a handsome cartoonist with good taste of fashion, but an ultimate cynic. Gyeongtae is a young and good-looking detective, but too shy to speak in front of girls. Three guys at first feel burdensome when Na-Young asks for support. As time goes by, however, they start to feel a deep emotion toward the baby and to Na-Young as well.
It showcases celebrities without singing abilities needing to sing to win the contest.
It centers on a maze that stands between two potential lovers.
"Gaslighting" tells the story of Korea's best psychological counselor Yeong-won and her mother-in-law Sa Kang facing each other's secrets and truths due to their husband and son.

A work about an incident that takes place when the owners of the boarding house called 'Guest Summer Palace', which breaks stereotypes, and boarders with secrets gather to find Lee Seol who disappeared 13 years ago.
A drama about what happens when a dangerous handmade cookie that fulfills a dream devours an elite high school.
After suffering a fall from grace, a photographer returns to her hometown and bumps into her childhood friend, rekindling an unfinished romance.
A science fiction thriller that depicts all students across the country fighting against unidentified objects ahead of the CSAT and fighting for extra points.
A story about Ji-won who after being killed by her husband who had an affair with her best friend, goes back 10 years in the past and has a chance to change her fate.

A top divorce lawyer faces off against her former flame in a heated court case. As they navigate their past and present, professional rivalry escalates the legal drama, blending personal feelings with courtroom tactics.
REMEMBER ME explores the issue of endangered species on our planet today. Disappeared from the wild, many can be only found in captivity or in monitored breeding programs.
IU's Palette is a fun talk show with a friendly and relaxed atmosphere. The show mixes humor with two segments of music by covering songs and singing duets with the guests.
Family drama begins to center around an unmarried pregnant woman and an unmarried man who enter into a false contract which leads to them to romance, pregnancy, childbirth, and childrearing.

primary_title: Numbers: Watchdogs in the Building Forest
original_title: Numbers: Watchdogs in the Building Forest
plot: The story of Jang Ho-woo, a high school graduate accountant, realizing justice against the absurdity of a giant accounting firm.

primary_title: The Story of Park's Marriage Contract
plot: When a widowed Joseon noblewoman is kidnapped and tossed into a well, it turns out to be a portal to present-day Seoul. Out of her element, she enters a contract marriage with a cold chaebol who looks just like her deceased husband.

Do you really want to know what's inside? A day is short if you have "Gangnam Signature Makgeolli," a great space with great friends. The vivid stories of experiences told by four people. There are more than one or two places that I can sympathize with even as a simple chatter. Don't pass it over or over again just because I was laughing. I'll punish you right away. An OTT Korean Wave drama that tells realistic experiences of MZs.
A spy comedy drama about an NIS Black agent husband disguised as an ordinary office worker and a sweet and cruel wife dreaming of a perfect family.
Depicts the power struggle of chaebol families. An exciting confrontation between a dirt spoon and a gold spoon unfolds.
Amid a tense inheritance fight, a charming heir clashes with his hardworking employee who's known for her irresistible smile, which he cannot stand.
A well-respected announcer suddenly loses his ability to self-censor on air, catching the attention of a TV writer who invites him on her variety show.

Guesthouse Daughters is a Korean variety show where five famous actresses and two famous comedians move into a large guesthouse and live together. As they live together in the large guesthouse, they play various games and greet new celebrity guests.
Sa-rang loves cooking, photography and her cat, Oi. Dating never interested her, however, now she feels like she's lagging behind her peers.
A romantic comedy between Deborah, the greatest love coach, and Lee Soo-hyeok, a publishing planner who has difficulty loving.

JHC Motors develops sentient mini robot cars called Watch Cars. As they spread worldwide, Jino and his Watch Car Bluewill join battles to face champion Kai, while Black Shadows pose a danger to all Watch Cars.
A man's life unravels when a mysterious woman arrives at his motel one summer, forcing him to grasp tightly to what he cherishes most.
A secret marriage service is uncovered when a trunk washes up on the shore, revealing the strange marriage between a couple in the thick of it all.

A drama showing what it is like for a scared high school girl, Song Woo-yeon, who is unable to express her intention in consideration of others, to find her heart beating, and how the world changes if she speaks out and loves herself.
A historical drama that deals with the second and third invasions of Goryeo by Khitan, also known as the Goryeo-Khitan War, from the early 11th century.
A famed plastic surgeon's life spirals out of control after an incident, leading him down a dark path where he performs reconstructive surgery on crime victims.
In Seoul, where a zombie virus outbreak has run amok, who will outwit the undead in the face of challenging quests and come out alive?
Three siblings separated in youth after their father's death in a smuggling scheme reunite as adults, determined to avenge those responsible for their family's tragedy.

A 33 successful career girl, Dal Ja, who's lousy in love enlists a paid boyfriend, a confident younger Tae-bong to save face from a failed romance. Dal Ja is drawn Tae-bong and also meets a rich separated man who interests her too.
A drama about a fat single woman Young Ae, and the stress and prejudice she goes through with her seniors at work, co-workers, and overtime.
A delightful, lively human romantic comedy about the reunion of old wrestling prodigy Kim Baek-doo and old alley leader Oh Doo-sik, who are living in a tough present life.
A young fashion designer seizes the opportunity to marry into a wealthy family, and finds out more about love and herself along the way, in this modern Korean take on several age old stories.
Depicts the story of profiler Kang Ho who works with police officer Shin Ji Ho in order to uncover the truth behind the mysterious incidents that continue to occur in a particular villa.
A tragic accident leaves an ambitious prosecutor with the mind of a child, forcing him and his mother to embark on a journey to heal their relationship.
A comic action drama in which a veiled cultural asset thief 'Skunk' and an unofficial cultural asset recovery team 'Karma' unite against those who cannot be judged by the law.

Bae Doo-na stars as a poor young woman just trying to make ends meet for herself and her sister. Through a series of events, she finally gets the chance to get ahead in life, while pursuing her dream of becoming a singer. Along the way, she may also find love and resolution to friend and family conflicts.

It tells the story of a medical graduate turned housewife but decided to return to the medical field, and a doctor husband who maintains a perfect dual life. He is great at his job and he is also great at cheating on his wife.
K-pop girl group main rappers' vocal battle. Their first step as vocalists beyond rappers. Who will be the artist who will be recognized in "The Second World"?
As a daughter-in-law, Min Sa-rin faces various challenges with her husband's family in today's society.
Once rivals in school, two brilliant doctors reunite by chance - each facing life's worst slump and unexpectedly finding solace in each other.

Ji Won Young's supervisor is fired for corruption and, although he is innocent of any wrongdoing, he is also fired. To get his job back, he tries to ingratiate himself with the president by seeking out his favorite artist.

Ji Yu, a liquor company marketer, pursues a partnership with chef Ki Hoon's restaurant, but Ki Hoon refuses to sell alcohol. Despite obstacles, the two men from different worlds grow closer through an intoxicating connection.
Lee Da Yeol is an outsider at school, but an ill-timed run-in with a classmate puts his scholarship in jeopardy.
A story about what happens when two men who have been friends since school days meet again at work and create a dating simulation game.

Cha Kang Jin, the son of barmaid Cha Chun Hee. He meets Han Ji Wan in their teens but they break up due to Ji Wan's death. Eight years later, he meets Ji Wan at her engagement ceremony, but is heartbroken as she pretends to forget him.

Shasha and Milo are the newly activated Crescent Island Guardians. Imbued with the power to transform between human, cat and a formidable hybrid form, Shasha and Milo are tasked with protecting Crescent Island from the dark forces.
Meet Dibo, a kindhearted dragon with a love of learning, friendship, and magical adventure!
The story of a sister who does not believe in the death of her brother, who made an extreme choice, meeting a mysterious man as she digs into the case.
Tells the story of a woman who cannot trust people because of her ability to hear lies and a murder suspect who no one believes in.
Lucia is an influencer who goes to Korea to study Korean Language. On her first day in Seoul, she meets a friend, and a weird guy who changes everything she knew about language.

primary_title: The Bean Chaff of My Life
plot: Eun Young and Gyung Soo meet in their early twenties when she is part of the campaign staff of a candidate in the local election. Complete opposites in everything, they clash and wind up going their separate ways.
There are two young people who pursue wealth and power. And then, there are other two young people, who lead a fulfilling life despite the difficult surroundings.
Kang Jae grew up under a jobless, gangster father. When Kang Jae accidentally meets Lee Dae Hae and his son Sun Mo, he feels more attached to Dae Hae than to his own father.

Han Jae Min, a budding photographer, is in love with Seo Hee Won. As an ELLE reporter she spends most of her time at Lee Seo Jun's photography studio Conan. Jae Min starts dating the perpetual exam taker Kim Geun Young, whose brother works at Conan, to get a job there. Naive girl that she is, Geun Young falls right into his plot. Jae Min's schemes are successful and then he tries to break things off with Geun Young, the girlfriend he never wanted. Geun Young however wants revenge for being used and isn't ready to let him go. She makes him sign a break-up contract. He must stay and help her get over him until she's ready to let him go. As Geun Young lets him go little by little Jae Min falls for her little by little. Unfortunately for Jae Min, Lee Seo Jun also falls for Geun Young and isn't afraid to show it.

Na Young is a thirty-something-year-old woman who gives in to familial pressure to get married. She enters a matchmaking service in a desperate attempt to find a husband. Meanwhile, Jae Won is a man fast-approaching forty with no money to his name. He, too, submits his name to the matchmaking service and by happenstance, the unlikely couple are paired together and married.
An enigmatic senior crosses paths with a lost freshman. As their relationship blooms, they're forced to confront their inner demons and embark on a journey of self-discovery.

This series revolves around bright hardworking loving mother Go Doo Shim as Lee Young Ja who does her best to insure that her family has a happy life. Her husband Joo Hyun as Kim Do Chil unfortunately ruins the atmosphere of the happy family by having an affair with a woman who comes to carry his child. The eldest daughter Bae Jung Ok as Mi Oak suggests to her mother that she get a divorce, while the youngest daughter Han Go Eun as Mi Soo finds attraction to the handsome looks of an investor who harbors a deep dark secret. Will this family be torn apart or can it be salvaged?

After years away, a divorcee women comes back to Korea with revenge on her mind. She rents a place from an ex-baseball player, sparking a web of suburban drama and surprising relationships in this Korean thriller.
Prime Minister Park Dong Ho battles a corrupt president colluding with chaebols. Deputy PM Jung Soo Jin confronts him, sparking a fierce political struggle to change South Korea's politics.

This story is about a woman (Cha Yeon) who grows up in an orphanage with her friend Ho Tae, Cha Yeon got married, had a child named Duri and then got divorced. Duri was born ill and Cha Yeon takes on any kind of job to earn money to save her son. After a scandal with Shin Dong Joo, she agrees to a paper marriage. To add complication to the mix, Dong Joo's girlfriend is not happy about being left out and Dong Joo's ex-wife begins to fall for Cha Yeon's friend Ho Tae .. Meanwhile, Seung Hye's sister is a patient at the hospital where Dong Joo's brother works.
A cooperative drama between a fraudster who cannot empathize and an overly sympathetic lawyer, as well as a revenge play against absolute evil.
Munju, an ex-ambassador, and Sanho, a secret agent, investigate an attack that could destabilize the Korean peninsula, unraveling a dangerous conspiracy that jeopardizes regional peace and security.

Se Ra and Hyun Min were lovers who have known each other since childhood. Tae Hee, a divorcee, worked for her father who was the head of a ship building conglomerate. She fell for Hyun Min and due to misunderstanding, Se Ra felt betrayed by Hyun Min and started going out with Tae Sung, Tae Hee's brother, and later married him. Hyun Min was never one who could express his feeling well and lost Se Ra's love even though he treated Tae Hee as a friend only. This drama also portrays the ship building industry in Korea and the world wide competition it faces.

A time-slip stock romance that takes place when a scholar of the Joseon Dynasty, An-ta, meets Min-ji, an MZ generation office worker, and discovers his talent for stock investment that he did not know.

Yoon Seok Joo is a producer who abandons his common law wife, Seo Young, to attain success. They have a daughter together but he later betrays Seo Young when he marries a rich man's daughter, Lee Jung Min. Lee Sang Min is an owner of a film company and is a new film director. He is also Jung Min's half brother. Sang Min will be a rival to Seok Joo in work and in love for Seo Young. Yoon Hyun Joo lost her dad at a young age and went through serious hardships and became a successful architect and is Seok Joo's sister. This drama is also about the lives of five siblings.

Park Seo Yoon's family is very successful but Seo Yoon does not flaunt her wealth around. Instead she pretends that she's an ordinary girl and not a spoiled rich girl. She works really hard to get into her father's company so that other co-workers will see that she worked her way to the top instead of getting help from her daddy. She dates Lee Joon Soo and doesn't tell him that she comes from a wealthy family, not even when he wants to meet her family.
In Gangnam, Seoul, Jae-Hee knows a secret about a series of disappearances but then vanishes herself. Detective Kang, outlaw Yoon, and Prosecutor Min pursue the truth for their own reasons.
Jake is looking for his brother but instead he find Kyle, they discover they are both sharing same blood of a pathfinder.

Young-Jin, a 27-old-lady with natural born pride and desire to succeed and be recognized is not backed up at all by her poor family; rather she needs to take care of all of messes and fusses that her grandfather, father, and younger brother committed. Having nothing to trust except for her own body and soul, she exerts herself to finally be appointed as a body gourd of the Blue House of Korea. At the Blue House, Young-Jin meets Kwanpil, a smart, excellent, cynical and charismatic colleague, who by instinct recognize each other as formidable rivals. They bump into each other at every course of training, extremely competing to beat the other, and what a mischievous fate. They end up being partner to protect Suho, the only son of Mr. President. Suho is an unstoppable rascal with high intelligence and violent nature. Suho is the key person who discloses the past of Kwanpil and realizes the true virtue of family and love. By describing two vivid characters Youn-Jin and Kwanpil, [Formidable Rivals] shows the life of body guards who by nature cannot be spotlighted. This is the story of the others, non-heroes, who support protagonists. They also have their own way of life, own value of family and love.

A simple yet heartwarming story of a three-generation family, The Road Home portrays the love and conflicts between family members running a general hospital. It explores the lives of the grown-up children who each have their own problems to solve, and the way they cope with their aging parents. Yoo Min-soo is the eldest son of the hospital's CEO. His wife Jang Mi-ryung bears a child out of wedlock but raises it with maternal love. Hiro, a Japanese model, confesses his love for Ji-soo, Min-soo's sister. But Ji-soo must later come to grips with the secrets behind her birth.

The thrilling war for up to 300 million won in prize money begins. A survival reality show in which 8 participants gain as much weight as possible for 3 weeks and then become the best sculpture-like body in Korea through various missions.
Roy is part of an up-and-coming soccer team trying to make its way into the Dream League. Together, they become friends and overcome their athletic challenges to be the best team in the league.

In the Joseon era, Kim Yoon-hee masquerades as a boy to earn a living as a book transcriber. Her family's dire circumstances and the encouragement of a noble's son finally drive her to attend Sungkyukwan University, forbidden for females.
A drama about a genius boxer Lee Kwon-sook who meets sports agent Kim Tae-yeong ahead of the Grand Slam, and faces an inflection point in her life.

"Sparkling Watermelon" will tell the story of a boy living a double life between a model student and a band member who gets to time slip and meets his 18-year-old father. The two will build friendships there.
Shin Dong-youp and Sung Si-kyung dive into adult entertainment in Japan, meeting people from all walks of life to demystify the "taboo" experience.

Kim Woo Jin was the top couple manager at a matchmaking company until he makes a mistake one day that sees him reassigned to lead Team Zero, a group of people who have had little success in matchmaking couples. In order to keep their jobs, they try their best to find romance for their clients, but their own love lives are also sadly lacking.

While working as a marketing intern at the Levan Art Museum, Cha In Young may not be living the dream life, but she's certainly on her way to making her long-term dreams come true. At least that was what she thought until Yoo Chan Hee, her boyfriend of eight years, suddenly announced that he was going abroad to pursue his own dreams and then proceeded to dump her. Now on her own, In Young has decided to swear off men and marriage and focus solely on herself and her career. Unfortunately, picking up the pieces of your broken life isn't easy, especially not once you realize you've been trapped in a shady real estate scam. Now faced with the possibility of losing her home, In Young has no idea what it is she's going to do next. At the end of her rope, In Young is willing to take drastic measures, in order to keep her home which is why she agrees to fake a relationship with one of her college juniors, Do Yoon Soo. An art management major who has only recently returned to classes, Yoon Soo has a complicated relationship with his sunbae. But when they both find themselves in need of financial support, he agrees to "marry" In Young to receive the government aid available to newlyweds.
The drama tells the story of a Metropolitan Investigation Team Unit tracking an organization called Vigilante, which judges the wicked people who escaped the law which has become a social phenomenon.

primary_title: Don't Ask Me About the Past
plot: Kwak Sun Young gets into a car accident and develops this ability of detecting a man's past from his body odors. She divorces her husband when she finds out about his long history of girlfriends. Sun Young then sets up a business where she helps women and even the police track down suspicious men and husbands.
A happy young Hugglemonster named Henry goes on adventures with his friends and family. When they run into problems,Henry finds a way to save the day.
A man with little chance for happiness and his ex, the unhappiest bride-to-be, are forced to accompany one another on the final journey of his life.

Inside a smart device, Appmen run apps while Jackie and Robin navigate chaos between two interconnected worlds. Their misadventures show how our digital and real lives mirror each other's comedy and drama.
The shy shut-in Dok-mi must come out of her shell when she gets caught spying on her handsome neighbor by his famous houseguest.

Jung Im closes down the shop early in preparation for her father-in-law's 60th birthday. Yet, his sons and daughters are nowhere to be found, and so as her husband Tae Ho. At this hour Tae Ho is with his co-worker Suh Young, whispering loves under the curtain. Nowadays, Tae Ho has no arousal around his wife, and sees no sparks in their conversations. Suh Young, on the other hand, is a light to his dull life. As secrets can never stay sealed forever, during his sleep Tae Ho unconsciously blurts out his love towards Suh Young. After such bitter incident, Jung Im is dragged to I-dol concerts by her friend Ae Ran, and unexpectedly ends up in a fight. Soon, the press releases news about her under the title by, "the revolting vigilant fan in her thirties!" Then Jung Im's life falls apart, as Tae Ho divorces her. Yet what she had not realized is that her life could also turn towards "good" when given just the right chance. As entertainment agency's head Hyun Wook decides to turn Jung Im into a successful Cinderella, her life changes. Then one day, as Tae Ho turns on his radio he hears a voice, a familiar one. Yes, it was his ex-wife Jung Im's. What would happen next?

Office politics take center stage for marketer Park Yoon Jo, whose lack of an academic background won't deter her dedication to her work, and the smart and just Ryu Jae Min, who lacks any expectations towards their company.

Lesser-known Korean celebrities(Hong Jin Kyung, Kim Sook, Joo Woo Jae, Jo Se Ho, and Wooyoung)come together to star on Beat coin, a show where all decisions, missions, and events are based off of a flip of a coin.

Ji Soon Young loses her husband, Wang Se Joon, in a tragic accident. She is left alone to take care of their adopted daughter. She meets and falls in love with Han Kyu Jin, who just happens to be the father-in-law to her former sister-in law, Wang Se Bin. Their lives changes when Soon Young marries Kyu Jin and becomes Se Bin's mother-in-law. They have to adjust to their new roles in their family and at the same time try to get along with each other.
An ordinary taxi driver who becomes entangled with a customer that turns out to be a serial killer.
Jae-i's search for her brother takes her on a journey of self-discovery and love. Along the way, she must confront the dark secrets of her family and the dangers of the Joseon era.

A thrilling tale of Queen Woo, who, after the sudden death of the king, must marry one of the power-hungry princes to ensure her survival. A fierce battle in Goguryeo breaks out among the 5 tribes vying for the throne.

'The Time Hotel' is a hotel survival survival where 10 guests try to survive as the last one in the 'Time Hotel', where you can buy everything with time instead of money, and check out as soon as you run out of time.
It tells the romance of Yu-ra a web novel writer who planed her new romance novel when she saw by chance the photographer Jung-woo but ended up being the main character of the story.
A web-drama about 4 young adults who hate Christmas who meet by chance and spend the month of December together. They unexpectedly become a part of each others lives as Christmas nears.
"Oh. Young-shim" tells the story of Young-shim's 30s before the word 'middle school second-grade disease' was born, a story of the adolescence feverish with life and love.

Depicts the solid friendship and sincere love story of 18-year-old youths who cannot give up love or friendship. The drama deals with the unique subject of cellular memory, which hypothesizes that memory is transferred to organ recipients.

In-suk, a former professional ballerina is a professor at the department of dance and having a normal marriage life. However, she feels bored of the present peaceful life, she happened to encounter Jun-ho at the parking lot. She came back to her normal life despite being attracted by Jun-ho's young and tough charms. He turned out to be a boyfriend of In-suk's student. In-suk became more attracted to Jun-ho without consciousness and at last she began to shadow him.

Jin-woo is a pro-gamer and a playboy. He knows nothing but playing and flirting with other chicks. One day, as he was staggering in an alley while drunk as usual, he found an old joystick and brought it home tying to operate it. As time went by, Hitomi, the heroine of a game, whom he felt in love with appeared to him in person and they started spending every day, making love vehemently. But he began to feel something weird.
24 female police officers, firefighters, bodyguards, soldiers, athletes and stuntwomen team up by profession to compete for survival on a remote island.

Seung Jun, a wedding singer, finds himself withdrawn after getting his heart broken by his first love. Jae Hyun, a charming pianist, becomes instantly besotted and sets out to pursue him. Will the pianist succeed in serenading the singer?

It portrays what happens after the dirty Kim Hye-in, the only witness to the murder of a high school girl, moves to Cheongdam International High School, where everyone wants, and meets Baek Je, the main suspect.

Natural born fighter Yo Seok (Bae Yong Joon) is constantly under the radar of a gangster organization looking to recruit the youngblood. But instead of falling into temptation, Yo Seok leaves his hometown to pursue his dream of becoming a policeman. While studying night and day for his college entrance exam in the big city of Seoul, Yo Seok rescues a girl named Hye Joon (Ko So Young) who turns out to be the daughter of the city's public prosecutor. The two gradually fall in love with each other but tragedy strikes when Yo Seok finds out about his triad family background. Suddenly the same fate that brought them together, now threatens to tear them apart.

Jung Ha-ram, a new hire at a production company, falls in love with his team leader Seo Yi-joon at first sight. Ha-ram, who is used to getting all the attention, is surprised to find out that Yi-joon is not easily swayed.

Yoon So-ra (Lee Cheong-ah): She is the owner of Sora Motel on the east coast, and has an insatiable desire for food. She is a helpless klutz, but she dreams of becoming a dolphin trainer somedady. Jang Tae-poong (Lee Wan): He openly admits that he has no brains, but he is a bold fellow who always gets into trouble. He is deeply loyal to his friends and very protective towards the person he loves. One day, he meets a country girl who is full of curiosity. Jang Tae-hyeon (Jeon Jin): He has excellent decision-making skills and a sharp wit, and a strong work ethic. All in all, he is the perfect man. He dates a woman with the right background to help him along the way in his ambitious career but somehow he falls in love with a rather unconventional girl. Min Joo-hee (Actress Kang Jeong-hwa): She's pretty and too smart for her own good, which makes her an annoying person. She stays close friends with both Tae-hyeon and Tae-poong, but she eventually finds true love.
Park Mi Jeong, became a translator because of her excellent English skills. Despite her beauty, she led a solitary life, earning the nickname "witch" as men fell in love with her mysterious charm.
A miraculous love story of a married couple overcoming a dizzying crisis.

Rookie superheroes compete for popularity. But after saving the earth from a crisis when they discover the identity of a villain responsible for environmental pollution, they emerge as full-fledged heroes.
The story depicts the life of a woman who starts to doubt her happy daily life and two women struggling to escape from their unhappy daily lives.
Four warriors who gathered to catch the moon rabbit who fled to Earth. A new concept hybrid multiverse action adventure variety that unfolds across time and space begins.

In-ho (Lee Tae-Ran) is a radio PD, a workaholic with a bright personality. She meets a man with the same first and middle name, In-ho Lee (Kim Sung-Su). In-ho Lee is a talented singer-song writer and Radio DJ, but is saddled with personal problems (he's divorced and his father committed suicide after a business failure). Although at first these two don't get along, as time passes they start to develop feelings for each other.
About a boy taking the world by wining aspiring top challenge and has to go through bal.

Mi Ja, Ji Young and Yun Ah are three 30 year old urban single woman.. Mi Ja is a dub actress who is devoted to find a right man before becoming too old, but she failed in every blind date and neglects the best man besides her. Ji Young's biggest wish is to marry her actor boyfriend who is with her for ten years; she has too many romantic love imaginations, she had too much to deal with her mother-in-law. She can't handle the love. She is easily influenced by friends, how should she decide this difficult but precious love? The hot and attractive girl Yun Ah, is a winner in love. She knows men well and handle them well. Mi Ja and Ji Young admires her, however, at last she failed in a married man.

A story that takes place in front of three successful friends when an old friend who became a murderer due to their lies 10 years ago, appears. The four face a whirlwind of life because of a man, and start a war of jealousy and desire.
The top 0.01% of students control law and order at Jusin High School, but a secretive transfer student chips a crack in their indomitable world.

After millions of years, humans consuming animal meat, BF now dominates the market for genetically engineered cultured meat. There are people inside and outside BF who starting to have doubts about the path taken by BF's CEO.
Cha Se-Eum, an ex-violinist turned conductor, harbours a dangerous secret. Meanwhile, mysterious cases take place within her orchestra. Adapted from a French work of the same name.
While boar hunting goes on in an ordinary country village, a missing person case takes place. Surrounding the missing person case, the villager's secrets are revealed one by one.
Art school students strive to prove that they are true in a culture where imitating one another is the norm. Han Yoo Sung is an outspoken, cold-hearted son of a wealthy family.
This drama will focus on the extreme fan culture that emerged in the 1990s when idol groups took center stage and K-pop was blossoming.
A melodramatic fantasy in which two women from Joseon Dynasty, belonging from a noble family, become intertwined with men through time travel to the year 2023, the present.

Reserved and introspective Han Joon has been in love with his best friend, Yoo Jae, since childhood. As they transition from high school to college, Han Joon grapples with his feelings, convinced that Yoo Jae doesn't feel the same.

primary_title: The Greatest Thing in the World
plot: A short Chuseok special drama about the social matters of teenage parenting and adoption. Woo-Seon (Choi Yoon Young), a strong minded woman with an even stronger ego and John Harrison (Lee Sang Yeob) who was adopted to Australia when he was young.
Ban Ji-eun can remember all her past lives. When her previous life is cut short by a tragic accident, she sets out to reunite with a man named Moon Seo-ha whom she met in her 18th life.
It depicts the love, sadness and pain of people surrounding a gisaeng house, where only VIPs can enter.
A diverse group of friends travels to Jeju Island and finds a magical candy that awakens memories, helping them heal, bond, forgive, and find inner peace.
An aspiring writer deep in debt encounters a young man with no memories and strange abilities. Together, they fight injustice and form an unlikely bond.
About two men who are trying to solve a mess after firearms are suddenly widely available in South Korea, which used to be a gun-free country, through an unknown source.
A woman is cursed by a witch, becoming twenty every day. To carve out a new future, she sneaks into a resort.

Even mothers were girls once, and although they're no longer young, it does not mean they cannot love. This warm family drama tells the story of Lee Soon Jin, a mother who raised her four children without a husband and single-handedly ran a restaurant to support their monetary needs. One day her ex-boyfriend Hong Kyu-Tak appears in front of Lee Soon-Jin. Her family then realizes that Lee Soon-Jin is more than just a mother and a woman with a personal life and past history.

The Villain of Romance is a captivating coming-of-age story set in college. The story follows two college students, Kang Hee Jae and Ban Yoo Jin, as they explore the intricacies of love, self-discovery, and relationships while on their path to adulthood.

Lee Yu Ri (Kim Bo Ra) is a young woman who has just been rocked by the death of her grandmother - the family member she loved the most. Heartbroken, she decides to try to make a new start by finding a job. She decides to attend a job interview at a cafe named Finland Papa, operated by a mysterious figure known only as "Papa." When she arrives, the staff members give her a meal and eat with her. She proceeds to do so - only to discover that eating was actually her "interview!" Lee Yu Ri lands the job, but is soon flummoxed to learn that the other staff members, like her, have no idea who Papa is. She also comes to learn that the staff members must take on "family names" - and must always dine together to maintain "family harmony." This rule echoes sage words her grandmother once told her. And it also reminds her of her closest friend and first love Baek Woo Hyun (Kim Woo Seok). When they were younger, Baek Woo Hyun would never let Lee Yu Ri eat alone, and always did his best to raise her spirits. Their parting was sad. But could working at Finland Papa somehow lead to their reconciliation?

Oh Wansoo, a world-class golfer married Kim Yonggu, heir to the Hwain Group. Her life changes when she narrowly escapes an assassination attempt in Manila. She develops feelings for her bodyguard Seo Doyoon unaware of Doyoon's motivations.
Follows a successful lawyer who has everything, but who is plagued by a family curse, and turns out that the one who holds the secret to breaking it is the seemingly ordinary civil servant.

Park Kyung Rim is an art gallery curator, who lives with her older brother Seung Soo, an English teacher, and her friend So Yoo Jin. Kyung Rim works for Kim Soo Mi, who co-owns the gallery with her husband, Chairman Kim. The Kims have three sons, the youngest of whom, Min Hyuk, is a troublemaker and gadabout. Park Shin Hye is a young student at Seung Soo's English school.

Kim Tae Won is an outcast at school, frequently laughed at by his peers. His only escape is newly discovered rock music, introduced to him by his uncle. Tae-won steals his older brother's unused guitar and learns to play a Led Zeppelin song by himself. Later, in high school he becomes the "Jimmy Page" of his neighborhood, showing off his guitar skills in duels and competitions. Being hot-blooded and overly enthusiastic about music and love, he soon becomes known as a hooligan. After losing his first love and going through depression, Tae-won decides to become a rock star, and founds a band named The End, which is soon renamed Boohwal (lit. "Resurrection" or "Rebirth").
An ordinary post office clerk is hired by an actress to save the face of the lover. After they agree to a six-month contract marriage, they face new challenges from those lies.
It tells the heartfelt story of friendship and growth in high school, where friends make up the entirety of one's world.

When an aloof, city-bred law student Seon Yul has a chance encounter with a passionate and kind farmer, Yechan, his world-view starts being more accommodating while the later helplessly falls for him.
In this competition of intelligence, contestants face off in games of wit and strategy to be crowned winner and go home with the ultimate prize.
A man who was led to a life of a con artist who preys on rich women meets the sole heir to a fortune who is a blind woman.
A group of young adults share their last week of teens and first week of twenties together - experiencing freedom and all the "firsts" of adulthood.
Young Ha Yoon faces an unexpected breakup before her 100-day anniversary. Determined to fight for her relationship, she refuses to accept her fate as Nam Tae Ryun calls it quits.
The chase to the top begins in this showdown between ten Korean professional baseball teams.
Stuck together on patrol of Seoul's Han River, the two officers are faced with emergency situations ranging from terrorism to everyday accidents and other incidents requiring emergency assistance.
A failed civil servant candidate takes a pub job, hoping for romance but finds workplace drama, clashing coworkers, and an unexpected connection with her polar opposite.

primary_title: The Trauma Code: Heroes on Call
plot: An elite team of trauma specialists at a university hospital led by the genius doctor Baek Kang-hyeok.
Human/were-fox half-breed Choi Kang Chi discovers the truth about his origins and searches for the mystical Gu Family Book, which holds the secret to becoming fully human.

Seven trainees (Asa, Pharita, Ahyeon, Rami, Rora, Chiquita and Ruka) all had the potential to debut as members of the BABYMONSTER. However, not all of them would debut as YG Entertainment wanted the group to have less than seven members.
Paik Jong-won takes on the challenge of opening Korean restaurants in foreign countries where few people are familiar with his name or Korean cuisine.
Story of of king Daemusin, third ruler of Goguryeo and grandson of king Jumong.
A Korean crime drama series about two distant brothers who must overcome their tragic past in order to reunite in the present.
An unassuming college freshman student learns that the woman who lives downstairs is a former pop idol - will she steal his heart?

Jeong Nyeon has no money or education, but she has a talent for singing. Her dream is to join a traditional female theater company and succeed. Will Jeong Nyeon achieve her dream of becoming a big star and becoming rich?
A mystery chase drama about detective Oh in the countryside.
The drama tells the story of the life of Dae Jo-yeong, also known as the founder of the kingdom of Balhae, from birth to his death.
Join Chanseong as he introduces hot places that serve delicious food, watch him recreate the dishes from the restaurants' menus, and learn new recipes from him.

Reality survival show. The show consists of three categories (idol, singer-songwriter, and vocalist) where there will be individual competitions as well as group competitions. The show's winner will then be one person or one idol team.

In their 15th year as a team, Girls' Generation finally returns as a whole team. Eight members will please fans and charm viewers by diving into the world of variety programs: talk show, game, cooking, documentary, etc.

primary_title: The Origin - A, B, or What?

plot: A story in which ominous things continue and the secrets of the family are revealed as they suddenly inherit the family mountain from their uncle, whom they had forgotten.
A dating app that alerts you when someone within 10 meters has romantic feelings for you. A high school student relies on it to pursue her crush, unaware of its unintended consequences.

Korea's leading female artists, upholding the legacy of dancing queens from each generation, have united for an extraordinary road trip. They travel across the country, delivering captivating performances that leave a lasting impression on audiences. They travel from coast to coast with a new theme for each destination and perform their best hits, putting together legendary stages one after another. "Dancing Queens on the Road" showcases legendary stages and brings joy to fans' everyday lives.
A quirky family runs an obstetrics clinic. The father, a gynecologist afraid of surgery, relies on his hardworking wife who manages the household and their four distinct daughters.

Three women, Yoo Soo Yeon, Cha Hwa Young, and Go Mi Sook, face tragedy due to greed and desire. Yoo Soo Yeon marries a chaebol family man, while Cha Hwa Young tries to maintain an upper-class life, while Go Mi Sook is a good person.
In the unique form of "neo essays," the nine members of NCT 127 share never-before-heard stories from their childhood through an eclectic mix of theater, animation, dance, song, and performance art.

Bump Up Business is about a Kpop idol named Eden who's about to debut, he encounters an idol under the same agency as him named Ji Hoon. Not long after seeing Ji Hoon, Eden is told that he can only make his debut by doing a Business Gay Performance with Ji Hoon. Eden wants to reject such a reality but he follows what his agency wants him to do. Eden and Ji Hoon still squabble but over time they start to get closer. Misunderstandings between Ji Hoon and Eden begin to build up, will they be able to clear up the misunderstandings and find their true feelings for each other?

Young Moo Jin joins a secret agency helping admirers win over crushes. Leader Min Shik, student Ah Rang, and tech whiz Min Gyo make up the team. A chef with a split personality lives nearby, but will he aid or sabotage their endeavors?
Female witch Lee Hae Na owns a struggling witchcraft store facing closure. Despite her prowess in curses and spells, she lacks business skills.

The Candy Factory is the place where all Zoobles are born. Beyond the factory is a world called Candy Land where all Zoobles live. The story revolves around three main Zoobles: Chevy, a Cat Zooble with an Orange Flavor, Coron, a Rabbit Zooble with a Strawberry Milk Flavor and Panky, a Panda Zooble with a Blueberry Yogurt Flavor. The three of them live in Candy Land, living and playing together with their friends and getting in misadventures as they learn to solve each problem they face.

Kim So Hyun (Kim Tae Hee) is an orphan who lost her father at a young age. Her father, who was a movie director, died in a fire while trying to save his original movie. Having been inspired at a young age, So Hyun took up writing with a desire to make a movie someday. When So Hyun becomes a young adult, she moves into a new apartment. Due to a communication error, she ends up sharing the apartment with a handsome young man named Kim Joon Pyo (Gong Yoo). Little does she know that Song Yoo Ra (Oh Seung Hyun), a childhood classmate, has a secret crush on Joon Pyo. Coincidentally, Yoo Ra and So Hyun work at the same place - So Hyun as the theater clean-up attendant, and Yoo-Ra as a staff in the production department. Park Tae-Young (Park Jung-Chul) is another staff in the production department of the theater that So Hyun and Yoo Ra work at. He meets So Hyun and is surprised to find himself eventually falling for her. As the drama progresses, the love triangle between So Hyun, Joon Pyo, Yoo Ra, and Tae Young becomes more severe. To make things even more interesting, So Hyun eventually finds out that the fire that killed her father, may not have been an accident.

His childhood first love, Choi Jun, who disappeared without a word, returned as a hot general manager. An office rom-com about idol-turned-intern Lee Jun and Choi Jun, a heart-fluttering genius director.

primary_title: A Returner's Magic Should Be Special
original_title: Kikansha no Mahou wa Tokubetsu desu
plot: Just when he thinks it's the end, Desir wakes up 13 years in the past. Can he make the changes needed to save the world from destruction?
An aspiring singer who spends fifteen years alone on a deserted island before setting out on a journey to become a diva.

Guk Hwa is a young country girl who leaves Yanbian (China) for Korea to get married. When she arrives in Seoul, she finds out that her fiance had just died in a car accident. Instead of returning to China, she decides to stay and create a new life in Korea. With the help of her fiance's family and in particular his nephew, Woo Gyeong, she is able to overcome the hardship of living in a foreign country.
A romance fantasy based on the story of Odol-yi on Geomundo Island.

Follow the story of acquaintances Ba Ram and Han Tae after an incident occurred during their school years. Now that they are adults, will Ba Ram be able to suppress the feelings for Han Tae that he has harbored for so long?

Byung Tae, a socially awkward teen bullied for most of his life, transfers to the countryside, hoping for a fresh start. Yet high jinks ensue when he is mistaken for the best fighter in school and must maintain the facade.
A story about a woman in her 40s who returned back to work as an intern after 7 years of being cut off from her job to endure and survive in a jungle-like society again.
A high-teen fantasy romance drama in which national idol Yoo Je Bi, who suffers from malicious comments, falls into romance novels and realizes the meaning of a new life.
K-drama TV show about a young woman who becomes consumed by greed and ambition, and, the man who once loved her who's now determined to stop her and make her pay for her past sins.
Princess Purple's secret identity is endangered, she transforms into a human while the other princesses face challenges.

primary_title: EXO's Travel the World on a Ladder in Kaohsiung&Kenting

plot: Hee-Kyung (Choi Myoung-Gil) is married and they have a daughter, Zem-Ma (So E-Hyun), and a sick son. Hee-Kyung meets her first love and she decides to leave her family for her first love. Zem-Ma has a difficult time after her mother leaves her. Her father then suddenly dies. Zen-Ma suspects someone was behind her father's death. She decides to take revenge on her mother, while searching for the truth behind her father's death. Meanwhile, Ki-Seok (Park Yoon-Jae) doesn't believe in love since his wife betrayed him. Nevertheless, he gets attracted to Zem-Ma. He has a younger brother Hyun-Seok (Shin Jung-Yun) with a free spirit.

Finally, NCT is launching a new unit. This is SM's first pre-debut reality show to launch the last unit of NCT. It will be the first show to reveal the debut process of SM idols. Who will be selected to debut with SMROOKIES in the new NCT unit?
A woman steps into an odd machine and becomes - a chicken nugget? Now, it's up to her father and admirer to embark on a zany quest to bring her back.

NCT Universe: LASTART follows 10 trainees competing through training to become 4 final members of NCT, joining existing members from SM's ROOKIES program. The journey determines the last fixed lineup of NCT.
When one accidental killing leads to another, an ordinary young man finds himself stuck in an endless cat-and-mouse chase with a shrewd detective.

Divorced individuals cohabit, sharing stories and forging bonds. As emotions intertwine, they navigate past complexities, seeking new connections and love after divorce, amidst laughter, tears, and unexpected twists.
Risqué Business is an all-new talk show featuring Shin Dong-youp and Sung Si-kyung, where the two meet and explore people from the unknown world of adult entertainment.

Follows daft but lovable Mignon, a mechanic moonlighting as a boxer in an illegal arena, and the lengths he goes to in his loving devotion to Oh Young-One, the arena's resident doctor, who himself harbors a dark secret.

Hong Yun has been friends with Ye Chan since elementary school, they are 18 years old, and they both dream of love. Ye Chan is in love with Ji Hyo once he confesses his feelings to her, but for her, he is just a friend.
In dire need of money to pay for his daughter's hospital bills, Myeong-jun decides to kidnap a girl named Ro-hee in exchange for a ransom from her rich parents.

K-pop sensation Super Junior marks 12 years together with a new album. A reality show follows the group for 120 days, showcasing their journey from military service to album creation as they gear up for an exciting comeback.

Lee Won and Kim Ji Oh, rival aspiring actors/directors, constantly clash. When Lee Won's sister writes a novel describing them as lovers, an outraged Lee Won vows to make that plot a reality if he falls in love with Kim.
A love story between a woman and a man who take revenge to recover neglected justice and lost families.
"New Normal Zine" is about the struggles of editor Cha Ji-min (Jung Hye-seong) who pursues the slow life but gets a job in a digital magazine company which is at the front-line of trend.
A fantasy romance about Gyoo-han who is struggling to fight alone to win his crush, but is jinxed with bad luck every time he sneezes.
A man who digs into his mother's mysterious death meeting humans with the same faces as him one by one and becoming embroiled in a bigger conspiracy.
A simpleton faces a crisis when urged to resign, goes from rags to riches, and confronts aging realities, depicting generational struggles in the present era.

Kang Tae Joo and Shin Hae Won were inseparable friends, sharing the love of baseball. But then Tae Joo's parents tells him he is moving to the USA, Tae Joo hopes to see his friend again, many years pass and Tae Joo doesn't give up. Tae Joo eventually comes back to South Korea to find his friend many years later only to find that Hae Won is now a girl.

primary_title: To Do X Tomorrow X Together
plot: TO DO X TOMORROW X TOGETHER (also known as just TO DO) is a variety web series by TOMORROW X TOGETHER. The show features the members competing in teams or individually in various challenges and games.
Ex-couples who broke up for various reasons gather to look back on their past love and to find new love.
The story set in the late Goryeo Dynasty in which a group of Feng Shui advisers to the government authorities help the hero Lee Sung Gye become the first king of the Joseon Dynasty.

Eight female dance crews that represent South Korea will compete to be the No. 1 team. The dancers will showcase various genres of street dance, including hip hop, waacking, locking, krumping, and breakdancing.

Welcome to Bistro Shigor. The show observes celebrities running a pop-up restaurant in a remote rural town. Consulted by the best chefs in the country, the restaurant serves fantastic french cuisine using local ingredients. You can also enjoy watching what celebs are doing for running a restaurant, from cooking, serving the customers, and managing everything.

Seo Cho-Hee (Han Da-Gam) works as an AE (account executive) for an advertising company. She has worked there for 12 years. She wants to buy an apartment in the Gangnam area of Seoul and she struggles to achieve that goal. Through her struggles, she realizes that real happiness derives from her family and not an apartment.

primary_title: A Good Day to Be a Dog
plot: An unpredictable fantasy romance between a woman living under a curse that causes her to turn into a dog when kissed, and the only one who can help her overcome the curse is a man who is afraid of dogs.
Korean soap opera detailing the marriage lives of three sisters.
Four foodies travel around South Korea to introduce all the existing flavorful wonders of Korean cuisine.
Celebrity players will pair up as they try to win a "real-world scale" version of Blue Marble. Only one team will emerge victorious - but who has what it takes to become the marble king?

Love doesn't judge. Some say that we live in the era of narcissism, because people have their say in everything these days thanks to the widespread use of the Internet and communication as well as political and social freedom. There are always people on the street using their mobile phones and talking busily to someone. Blogs and personal Web sites have also been developing rapidly. Everybody is the main character nowadays. But despite the abundance of communication, people these days are more lonesome than ever because everybody is talking only about themselves -- about their wounds being larger than the wounds of others and about their needs being more urgent than other people's needs. Everybody claims that they are the best and the most lonely. But nobody listens to them. In the end, we all think that we are treated unfairly. The greater access we have to communication the more lonesome we feel. That is the downside of the era of narcissism in the 21st century. Can you throw a stone at her? There is a woman who was abandoned by her mother as soon as she was born and was raised by her impoverished grandmother. She also served a sentence for accidentally killing someone while in high school. She has the worst credentials to live in this merciless world, and people easily stigmatize her as a "sinner." But who doesn't have sins? And what credentials can be better than hers from the standpoint of people who have money and power? What does a "sin" mean to humans? Who will dare to throw stones at her? -- KBS.
Different cast members are required to live under a certain condition for one week, whilst documenting each day on video.
Paik Jong Won visits several different restaurants across South Korea to aid and assist the businesses in improving their overall food quality.
Three friends - a former soccer prodigy, a medical student, and a wealthy heir - navigate their twenties after graduating high school, each on a different path to find meaning and purpose in life.
A girl disappears from the world due to the Bobble Incident, and seven evil people are involved in the incident.
Dooly, a dinosaur who was abducted by aliens and give special magic powers, is frozen and awoken millions of years later in South Korea where he meets new family and friends.
Follow the 7 group members as they enjoy a trip to Danyang for 3 days and 2 nights.
