A fateful romance about Kim Byeol, a fatalist who is pessimistic about her fate and devoted herself to fortune telling, finding herself in front of two Woo Joos whose names are the same as her future husband's. What will she do about the situation?

primary_title: All the Love in the World
plot: "All Love in the World" is a realistic yet fresh and comic depiction of the romance of various young couples nowadays. The webdrama is divided into three seasons, each one is focused on one couple with their own problems. Season 1 follows the story of a couple who started as a college campus couple but who encounters problems because of their age difference.

A drama that portrays the challenges and friendships of high school students as they navigate the ups and downs of growing up. It follows a group of ordinary yet remarkable teens as they chase their dreams, discovering who they are and the bonds that will shape their futures.

A story about an idol who struggles to navigate the challenges of the entertainment industry while also dealing with personal issues at home. As he faces pressure from both his career and family, he learns to balance his public persona with his private life, revealing the complexities of fame and the strength it takes to overcome them.

When the Snow Queen takes Nam Ji Seob with her so that he can be the ice prince, the only way Seo Ga Eun, Nam Ji Seob's childhood friend and a webtoon writer in seclusion, can save him is by finding 7 memories in time. It's just like finding 7 pieces of the puzzle. So with the help of the doll knight, she tries to save Ji Seob. In this adventure, Ga Eun encounters Fairies, Yeti, Snow Queen and many interesting Korean retro characters.

Set in the picturesque town of Cheongdo, this story revolves around the lives of two high school students, Soo Ah and Soo Hyuk. Soo Ah temporarily moves to Cheongdo to help her mother with persimmon farming. While adjusting to the new environment, she encounters Soo Hyuk, a responsible and hardworking student who is determined to carry on his family's café business. Soo Hyuk also happens to be Soo Ah's first love. As Soo Ah and Soo Hyuk spend time together in Cheongdo, their friendship gradually blossoms into a deep bond.

This is a story about those who fall just short of being heroes, who are too busy living their own lives to save the world. They have powers-not supernatural, but the ordinary strengths that make a difference in everyday life. It's a tale of how small, unnoticed abilities can still impact the world in meaningful ways.

Then one day, she sees Do Hee, a senior she runs into at school, and Da Bit feels a strange attraction. Da Bit, who follows her out of curiosity about Do Hee, enters a unique tarot shop.

Japan and Korea co-produce Korea's most popular romance show "HEART SIGNAL". A shared house where Korean men and Japanese women can fall in love in South Korea. Love lines are created through anonymous messages sent only to the person you are interested in. Is it possible to notice the "signal" of feelings from the person you like and find love? A romantic love like a Korean drama begins.

Da Rim's family runs a struggling dry cleaners business. One day, she learns that she is going blind and there's a cure but it is expensive. Her family happens to find a lot of money and a man she had a fling with from her past resurfaces.

Gong Ji Hoon, CEO of an AI art collection startup, will participate in "Constar IR Day," the last opportunity for the business. Kim Jae Hee, the youngest director of Constar, gets involved with Gong Ji Hoon in a public and private way... Gradually, work and love coexist.

The story of a diverse group of young adult professionals, including an event organizer, master chef, a webtoon writer, a fashion designer, an interior designer, and a classical singer, as they chase their dreams and look for love. Will they achieve it?

The story centers around a man and woman who have different perspectives and memories when it comes to love. The scenes in the drama will be split into a man's point of view and a woman's point of view to show how the same situation is remembered differently by the man and the woman.

There are companies that enforce enthusiasm, fierce competition, and human relationships for survival. There are youngsters who got tired of life in Seoul and moved to a small town. Oh Hoo gets exhausted by the company that wants to use all his time, so he resigns from the company and leaves to a small city, where he meets Shin Na Ra, Hyun Jae, and Yeo Un Shik. A romance drama that will make you feel deeply relatable with its various no-good relationships, and the fun of finding a 'Benz' (good relationship) within it. A web drama made with lyrics from familiar songs, making it feel even more relatable. A twist drama where you'd never expect to find such 'bad cars' hidden in those familiar songs.

Summer vacation has emptied a Japanese boys' school of all but three boys: the junior Norio and the seniors Kazuhiko and Naoto. They have no families to return to for the summer, so they spend their days in the empty school. A darkness hangs over the three however: the suicide, three months earlier, of classmate Yu. Norio blames Kazuhiko for Yu's death, because it was well-known that Yu loved Kazuhiko; so Kazuhiko is cruel to Norio, and yet has bad dreams. This uneasy arrangement is exacerbated by the arrival of Kaoru, a student early for the fall - who looks exactly like Yu.

An omnibus drama about the interconnected complicated lives of young people and their equally complicated relationships. An omnibus drama about the interconnected complicated lives of young people and their equally complicated relationships.

Kim Moo Young, Heo Won Ho and Baek Ji Soo have been friends since high school. Now in their 30s, each of them is struggling in their own way. Moo Young works at a dead end job in a convenience store. Won Ho gave up his dream of writing music to work in an advertising agency. Meanwhile, Ji Soo is an aspiring movie director. Moo Young had a crush on Woori in high school. One day, Moo Young's friends, who have no concept of personal space, decide that they should go on a road trip together. Unbeknownst to his friends, Moo Young who is struggling with depression has been planning to commit suicide.

Someone has deleted all the TVXQ's recordings so that they have to re-record everything. Soon afterwards, threatening letters appear, the boys' concert outfits are torn, and U-Know's underpants are stolen. Together the boys must use the clues and solve the mystery.

Yoochun and his childhood friend Sungmin met Soohyun in high school after seeing her play the flute, and the three became best friends. As a result of the time they spend together, both boys fall in love with her. Yoochun had decided to confess his feelings through a song he wrote for Soohyun's birthday, but before he had a chance to give it to her, he sees her giving a special gift to Sung Min. Devastated, he abruptly ends his friendship with both Sungmin and Soohyun after that. Years later, Soohyun tracks Yoochun down to tell him that Sungmin has died, and she wants him to attend the funeral. Slowly, the truth reveals itself.

U-Know escapes from his manager, who has demanded that all of the members take a day to rest. Yunho meets a Korean tour guide and forces the girl to take him sight-seeing. At the same time, the girl's father gets into trouble and soon U-Know and the rest of the band are called in to save the day.

34-year-old Bong Dal-Joong (Kim Kuk-Jin) lives with his cancer stricken mother in the countryside. His mother's wish is to see Dal-Joong marry before she dies. To make his mother's wish come true, Dal-Joong takes part in a blind date event for men in the countryside. There, Dal-Joong meets Seon-Hwa (Kim Min-Hee). After dating several times, the couple decides to marry. On the day of their wedding, Seon-Hwa runs away with Dal-Joong's money and jewelry. Dal-Joong knows now he was scammed by Seon-Hwa, but he can't tell his ill mother the truth. Instead, Dal-Joong tells his mother that Seon-Hwa was involved in a car accident on their wedding day. Dal-Joong then sets out to find her.

Yoochun, the masked fencer, has fallen in love with Lady Hye Jin. However because of family tradition, she is forced to marry Sir Yun Ho. After hearing about Yoochun's and Lady Hye Jin's relationship, Sir Yunho forces his slave, Yoochun, to work labor even harder. How will it end?

Yunho and Yoochun are high school students, both the exact opposite of each other. Yunho is rebellious and athletic, Yoochun is quiet and romantic. Hye Bin is the new and naive transfer student. As soon as she arrives, she accidentally breaks Yunho's bike, causing tension between them. Hye Bin becomes quickly falls in love with Yoochun for his gentle nature as he lends a shoulder while Yunho tries to make life hard for her. However, Yunho soon falls in love with her as well. Who will she choose?

With deductive reasoning to rival Sherlock Holmes himself, Gon Hwan starts an investigation club at his university to track down a campus stalker. The web drama revolves around delivery girl Kwak Doo Shik who is well-versed in martial arts. She teams up with Do Ki Hwan, the delivery agency manager, in order to find her mother. In the process, they run into conspiring aliens who have invaded Earth.

A story about a breathtaking and thrilling office romance between Lee Eun Jung, who lives with a friend from her childhood, and Jung Jae Hoon, her old friend and team leader at Eun Jung's workplace. A story about a breathtaking and thrilling office romance between Lee Eun Jung, who lives with a friend from her childhood, and Jung Jae Hoon, her old friend and team leader at Eun Jung's workplace.

Humans are quick to adapt and follow changes in the environment. Mothers, fathers, sons, and daughters are all members of the family, so they are members of society before they become members of society, and individuals before they become members of society. This drama is a story about a family that faces a crisis triggered by the collision of changes in each individual, which is the highest level system. I hope that we can briefly realize the importance of the family community that is fading away as we think and act based on the individual. I want to write a warm and sympathetic story about the process of a broken family finding its original form and healing as we realize the importance of family that we had forgotten at some point while hurting each other, which we should have cherished within the fence called family.

Jung Tae is very upset. He borrowed money from his friend Jung Bae to start a business, but even that failed, leaving him with a debt of 30 million won. Because of this money, his friend is imprisoned. While trying to find money, Jung Tae thinks about his hometown. When he opens the front door and enters, his mother Ok Soon beats him with a broom and kicks him out. Ok Soon swears at him, asking what he came back to take, and even sprinkles salt on him, saying that he is unlucky. With nowhere to go, Jung Tae visits his father's grave in Seonsan and racks his brain about how to get through this difficult time. At that moment, an old monk (Im Hyeon Shik), who is either a beggar or a monk, asks him for a drink and says that the grave site is bad, and that a fortune teller will be born for generations and ruin the family. The old monk then tells Jung Tae that the grim reaper comes and goes in his face, and tells him to look at his fortune. The old monk who read the fortune says that he has never seen such an unlucky fortune in his life and that he will die before he gets to the year of Gye-mi. When he hears that he only has five days to live, Jung Tae ignores him and accuses him of being a fool. That day, Jung Tae ends up at the police station because of his uncle Bong Seop, and the next day, his teeth break because of a ring in his dumpling soup. When the old monk's prediction comes true, Jung Tae cries and asks if there is any way to live. The old monk advises him that if he meets a woman born in the fourth month of the year of the pig and gets married, he might be able to cover up his sin. When he hears that it is a woman born in the fourth month of the year of the pig, Jung Tae sees the fortune. However, the woman who appeared at that place was none other than Young Hae, a friend that Jung Tae liked. Young Hae, a police officer, said that her junior was dating a man, so she came instead, and that if she had known that Jung Tae was coming, she would never have come, and the two bicker and fight.

Depicting the story of elementary school student Gye Sal Gu, who is always short of pocket money. One day, a magical bankbook with money falls from the sky. plot: The kiss of that day ruined everything. This story begins with a sudden kiss that is to show what four men and women want when they want to say goodbye to each other. This is a complicated, bitter-sweet fantasy love story of four people who come together to experience real love. The series is a sequel to Moment, Studio Lululala's representative digital drama series. The emotions men and women often feel when they're on a date will be described in an advanced format with refreshing characters. There is a couple who have gotten bored with each other. And there is another couple who broke up after hurting each other. Four different young men and women come together to resolve the complicated problems of their love affairs. A couple who dream of starting a new love and another couple who dreams of having a perfect farewell ceremony. Will they be able to reach the end of the story they want?

"Hanging On" is about a family who is far from being normal. The family hustles hard every day just to survive. The film aims to empower women of all ages in their past, present, and future by delivering a positive message.

A workplace romance reality show featuring 12 real men and women at a fictional company. The fantasy of a workplace romance turns into reality as these single new hires enthusiastically start both their careers and romantic relationships.

Sang Hyun, who sings, loves Hae Kyung, but Hae Kyung became a nun in sorrow after losing her father. Songwriter Yoo Jin likes Sang Hyun, but Sang Hyun cannot forget Hae Kyung. Eun Jae, a recording technician, loves Yoo Jin, but Yoo Jin is in love with Sang Hyun only. For a while, Eun Jae dreams of a love with Yoo Jin, but for Yoo Jin's endless love, Sang Hyun gives up on Hae Kyung and becomes engaged to Yoo Jin. However, the shadow of death for Sang Hyun changes the relationship between Sang Hyun and Hae Kyung, Yoo Jin and Eun Jae again.

plot: In the not-too-distant future, it has become possible to alter one's memory. The border between truths and lies becomes blurry in one's mind. Is there a truth one can depend on? Wu Jin runs a flower shop, one of the few that sells real flowers instead of common electronic ones. Wu Jin has a special ability, unbelievable memory and suffers side effects. He received his uncle, Dr. Park Yeong Jae's treatment for his special condition. Nevertheless, he is happy because he still has his memory of a loved one, Seo Yeon. On Wu Jin's birthday, Dr. Park left a present for him and headed out to record a television discussion program. Wu Jin is having a lonely birthday, but to his surprise, Seo Yeon, who left the country to study abroad, is standing before him. She says she came to celebrate his birthday together. They spend the night together drinking, which he shouldn't do as a part of the treatment.

However, even when she has money, she has a lot of urgent needs to spend it. Her eldest daughter is in urgent need of business, her son is demanding overseas medical expenses for a developmentally disabled grandchild, and her youngest daughter is demanding funds for her wedding, leading to a fight. Jung Cha Sik is a man in his 50's. He graduated from high school and now works as a salesman. His job is to import coffee beans, but he gets into trouble and causes damage to the company. He faces forced retirement because of what happened. A miracle then happens Jung Cha Sik. Overnight, he becomes "Luwak Human."

Yeong Hun, Jun Yi, Hyun Soo and Whe One are 14-years-old and friends. They go through a stormy period. Yeong Hun runs away from home, Jun Yi tries to seduce a married woman through an internet chatting site, Hyun Soo becomes involved in his father's death and Whe One suffers from progeria (rapid aging of children). They decide to go to a club in the Hongik University area. They get excited, but Whe One's condition worsens.

primary_title: The Diary of Heong Yeong Dang
plot: Cheol Ju, a Jwapocheong worker, investigates the body of a poisoned young man. But the criminal soon turns himself in, and he turns out to be Hong Yeon, the brother of the deceased Sang Yeon. Hong Yeon says that he took revenge because Sang Yeon abused him since he was young. Cheol Ju visited Heong Yeong dang to meet Sang Yeon's wife Hoe Jeong. Heong Yeong dang is the place where Hong Yeon, Sang Yeon, and Hoe Jeong spent their childhood together. And Cheol Ju found a hidden diary in there. Cheol Ju begins to trace the secrets between the two men.

My Sister's March commemorates the 50th anniversary of the Masan protest on March 15, 1960, where numerous citizens and students demonstrated against electoral corruption under the Syngman Rhee regime. The violent clashes that followed resulted in several students being killed, with many others suffering from the aftermath. This drama tells their story.
An omnibus drama that shows the different encounters and breakups of five couples.

Yeo Hee runs a vegetarian cafe at Jeonju Hanok Village. She is a thousands-old nine-tailed fox who still can't move on from Master Jin Woo, her first love a thousand years ago. One day, she finds out that Jin Woo has reincarnated, and now is Yoon Ho, a young and confident CEO. But Yoon Ho already gets engaged to another woman. Yeo Hee decides to seduce him to rekindle their long-lost love, and she asks Seung Hwan, a paramedic, to learn seduction in the modern age. Seung Hwan was devastated after his girlfriend dumped him. As he helps Yeo Hee, he slowly believes his chance to love someone again.

primary_title: The Best Moment to Quit Your Job
plot: Four young women tackle life, love, and lies in their first jobs out of college. Good thing they have each other - and late-night bars - to get through it all.

Kang Hee Kyung is the well-known Chief Surgeon of the University Hospital. Her husband unexpectedly dies in a car accident with his mistress. Kang Hee Kyung is shocked by accident. Since that time, Kang Hee Kyung has poured excessive love on her sole daughter. This has negative consequences on her daughter. Her daughter gets caught up in a mix of sex and drugs. She then kills someone by accident. Kang Hee Kyung then coverups her daughter's involvement in the killing. Prosecutors and detectives try to find the truth behind the case, where the body has yet to be found.

The struggles of one man and other characters based on their profession of being a labor attorney. After failing the bar exam, Lee Jae Goo becomes a consultant and labor attorney reclaiming the value of life.

Dread Mailbox is drama created, based on the calls and stories of viewers, recorded through phone number 1855-0666. It can be real experiences, stories heard somewhere, or imaginary ghost stories. Number is still active, and network encourages to continue sharing stories, using it. Each of the people whose story was featured in the series was awarded an airpod.

In this documentary series featuring actor Yoo Ji Tae and actress Ok Ja Yeon, they delve into the world of Korean shamanism. They follow the stories of people who suffer from seeing ghosts and unexplainable phenomena.

Hae Soo who has to go work part-time to earn a living while her friends go to academy. Today, she faces a wall of reality again. However one day, Woo Jae, who Hae Soo has a crush on, handed her a secret note... Hae Soo has a dreamy time with Woo Jae.

A drama from the SBS Hope TV donation program that tells the story of a bar hostess who encounters a deaf vegetable deliveryman. Bong Dal used to be an UDT personnel in the Navy, but lost his hearing in an accident during underwater blasting operations. He meets Soon Ok when he helps her escape from loan sharks, and this fateful meeting marks the beginning of a new life for two people who were unable to move on.

After getting discharged from the military and while the other BTS members are still enlisted, global superstar Kim Seok Jin engages in various activities and adventures, often with guests. Named and loosely formatted after Run BTS.
An original variety show where members of Korean group ILLIT participate in various activities and have fun together.

A series of loosely connected stories about the lives of three college students. In the first story, Soo Ah's carefully structured routine is thrown out of balance when she meets senior student Woo Jung and falls for her hard and fast. In the next story, Woo Jung is happily in love and wants the world to know. But the more reserved Soo Ah seems as if she'd rather hide the relationship. Finally, You Jin has been in love with her best friend Woo Jung for three years, content with quietly watching her from afar. When Woo Jung starts dating, You Jin suddenly realises how many opportunities she missed. Letting go can be hard, but maybe it's time?

When a serious fangirl meets a barista who looks exactly like her favorite celebrity, she begins working at the cafe to try and get close to him-but is her bias's doppelganger really the love for her, or could it be the guy she least expected?
About a fusion restaurant and three people who find work and love in there.

People who are somewhat lacking gathered and are making confusing, chaotic, panicking, risky story of running a travel agency. This travel agency, will be fine, right...?
A horror comedy drama about inhuman creatures appearing at the time of 24 and 25 O'clock. The drama is also known as "GS25" which aroused from the convenient store name 'GS25'.
Dong Hyung and Shi Young continuously have unusual encounters on the double-decker bus. What is going to happen to their relationship - will it turn into something more than just strangers?
Ghost Vros tells the story of a startup company that exorcises ghosts with VR equipment. Ghost Vros employees will look for ghosts with VR equipment and help vengeful ghosts through counseling.
This trilogy drama is about Gong Seon Hwa (32 years old), a social welfare worker who's getting married to Kang Won Hyung (30 years old), a Korean culinary chef, portrayed by Ji il Joo.
The convenience store worker, Nasarang, who is in love with Lee Si Bo 365 days a year, suddenly gains superpowers one day.

Park Se Bom finally meets the guy of her dreams, Kang Min Gi. On her way to school, she accidentally runs into him and destroys his project. After the incident, she starts to stalk him and they eventually develop feelings for each other.
Thirty-something Yeol-mae totters through her messy love life with the help from her best friends, whose romantic lives are no less complicated than hers.

The members of DIA star as alternate versions of themselves in this 3-episode web series. Each episode covers a different story: Chaeyeon aids a ghost who's searching for his younger sister, Eunjin struggles with her feelings for her best friend Heehyun, and Jenny follows her friend Yebin into a dangerous situation.

The Korea Grand Sale, a shopping and cultural festival for foreign tourists, is a nationwide celebration of shopping, tourism, and the Korean wave. Foreigners can enjoy a broad range of discounts and benefits, not only in shopping, but also other areas such as tourism, air travel, accommodation, transportation, food and drinks, and entertainment.
A woman raised in a motel in the countryside experiences twists and turns as she reunites with her first love in her hometown that she ran away from 12 years ago.
Love stories between men and women in their 20's and 30's with functions of various SNS features such as DMs, stories, comments, likes, and hashtags.

"Jo Mi Ryo" is a drama about Mi Ryo who escapes city life and goes to the island of Anbin for a month to heal from reality. At the island, she sets up a restaurant called Mi Ryo's Kitchen. The drama will depict diverse island life that is not completely leisurely and relaxed.

Eun Ho, a gumiho with nine tails, embraces her eternal youth and avoids human experiences. Kang Si Yeol, a successful soccer player, lives a perfect life until Eun Ho enters, altering the course of his life unexpectedly.

primary_title: Xi Wang Zhen : Ji Su Fan Ji

plot: Idol Drama Operation Team is a 2017 South Korean web variety program. The show centers around seven girl group members who will write and act their own self-produced drama. The drama is reportedly titled "Let's Walk The Flower Road." The 7 members of the cast are also in the girl group project, Girls Next Door through the show.
Idol School is a reality girl group survival show. The program aims to form a 9 members girl group out of 41 female participants, training them in singing and dancing in the span of 11 weeks.

The year is 2080, and earth as we know it is no longer the same. Wrecked by years of global warming and pollution, most of the population centers have long gone. People had no choice, but to look for another planet. Ten spaceships had survivors on board and they traveled through space for a long time, but were unable to find an inhabitable planet.
A CF for Lock&Lock plastics company; telling 12 mini stories based on insights of the different romantic traits for each zodiac sign.
Kim Pyung Bum has always been popular and has always sought to live as low-key as possible, but his return to college will leave him with a decision to make.

The love of teenagers is supposed to be secondary to the goal of college. However here, their sincere love is the first, thus they are called clumsy students, but isn't it the most valuable and brilliant thing? The story takes place at the Love Assistant Club in high school, which develops unrequited love into love, in the process of confessing a love that is both wrong and realized. A vague and touching romance of teenagers is portrayed. As they look at each other's wounds with sincerity, they grow stronger.

No more goody two shoe romance. The realistic portrayal of relationships between bad girls and bad guys. Ji Hye is a girl who draws satisfaction from boasting about the lovey-dovey relationship she made up while Jung Soo is the only man who knows her secret. Will Ji Hye's fake romance turns into a real one?

Two female bus attendants in 1980s Korea form a deep friendship while navigating love, dreams and personal growth. One battles motion sickness to support her family, while the other seeks escape from her troubled past.

"Love Formula 11M" will show the everyday struggles of youths. It tells the story of Ji Yoon, a girl who lives as a regular college student after experiencing an injury that forces her to give up on her dream of becoming a soccer player. The drama follows the romance between Ji Yoon and her good-looking upperclassman Tae Oh.
"The hottest time of the day, we are in it." Our story made by women in their 20s, talking about lively topics that women in their 20s can worry about.
In this time-warping web drama, a twenty-something reminisces on the hilarious and heartbreaking mishaps of his first love as he struggles to navigate romance in the present day.
A web drama about the all-too-relatable woes and wonders of love - unrequited, forbidden, and otherwise.
Yoo Min-woo, a man crazy about love, Moon Jung-seok, a man crazy about work.

The truth about violent crimes that the news and articles could not cover is revealed one by one. "The Chaser" is a 100% real investigation report based on the testimony of detectives who were in charge of violent crimes. The intelligent and violent criminals and the detective who chase after them.

The adult drama 'The Secret,' which realistically portrays the stories of couples who wish to hide their secrets, contains wisdom on how to live a proper life of sexuality and desire by suppressing lust and deviating behavior through 'secrets.' Viewers will learn how to overcome dangerous desires, understand the boundaries of lines that should not be crossed, and discover extraordinary and wonderful ways to correct distorted views on sexuality and protect their family through the dangerous and secretive stories of those around them. Each episode of this drama is created based on the real stories of people whose seemingly-ordinary lives are filled with secrets and dangerous desires.

An omnibus documentary drama that covers all the strange and mysterious things that happen even in this age of advanced science. It consists of a mini-documentary about visiting places where mysterious incidents occur and ghosts appear with psychic experts and encountering ghosts, and a documentary drama that reenacts real stories.

A drama that analyzes the different thoughts of men and women about love and separation. From the moment we start liking someone, we get hurt, hurt, and have a hard time. Is the relationship between men and women really an eternal homework that can never be solved? Schools teach us how to do math and spelling, but they don't teach us how to date. However, it's really absurd to think that even after graduating from school, what gives us the most headache is not math or spelling, but 'love'. There is definitely a skill to dating, and if you hone and refine the basic skills, you can definitely control success or failure to some extent. Dramas that use the love and conflict between men and women that have not been resolved for thousands of years as a medium are still valid. In particular, true stories of people who practice the skills of dating and love in real life will be able to gain a wider range of sympathy.

Oh Dae Bak, who became unemployed due to his company's bankruptcy. He lived a life of misfortune with no luck, but he emerges as a hero after accidentally saving a child from a fire and dying a righteous death.

Three women in their late 20s navigate love and sex in NYC. A company president, design department head, and bar owner face daily challenges. The show explores intimate topics candidly, addressing themes often avoided on network TV.

A drama about a hot-blooded Korean unemployed young man named Kim Kang Ho who flies to China with the goal of achieving the China Dream, but gets scammed and is helped by people who settle in Shanghai, where he learns the true meaning of life and finds love.

A real drama that depicts a unique interpretation of secret and forbidden love centered around 'Alibi Corporation', which does not actually exist but perfectly washes the private lives of its clients. Former bodyguard Jeon Jae Man lost his temper and acted violently toward his clients due to their unfair treatment. As a result, he was fired and began searching for a new job. One day, he meets a beautiful woman at a seminar whose job is to create alibis for clients engaged in extramarital affairs. She offers him a position working with her, and, captivated by her beauty, he accepts the offer. Thus, he embarks on a new career path.
Romantic mini-drama about love and friendship between university students.

A full-fledged courtroom dramatized from a real case that caused a huge social stir and led to a fierce legal battle. Since the case is shown from different angles based on the testimonies of the defendant and the witness, the tension is not let down until the end when the whole story of the case is clearly revealed. Not only the conclusion of the case, but also the occurrence of the crime and the unknown background story are meticulously recreated in the drama, so it is a masterpiece that combines the truthfulness and accuracy of a documentary with the fun and emotion of a drama. They don't allow any perfect crime. A lot of suspense in every episode. A surprising plot twist will be waiting for you in the end.
The first 19+ sexy comic chat drama in Korea that tells stories that all Korean men and women who dream of romance can relate to through chatting.

Centered around 6 college students with distinct Myers-Briggs Type Indicator (MBTI) types - a personality test that has recently attained renewed interest amongst Gen Zs - "MBTI Love" follows Ha Ram, In Wook, Byeol, Jae Wan, Woo Ri and Joon Seo as they learn to make sense of life and navigate friendship and love through university, with quirky and memorable encounters along the way.
Kim Soo is the representative of the best Korean clothing brand. Kang Yoo Na is a designer who works for the company. They meet and fall in love.
Suo suffers from noise as soon as she starts living alone but is that person the culprit?

'Momin's Room' will talk about how today's youth deals with love, friendship, and family while weaving in informational content about copyright. The main character is 23-year-old Momin, who moves from Jeju Island to Seoul and builds lasting friendships.

Mr. Yoo is the section chief of one of the worst performing sections in the company. One day while working late, he is chased by several men and is then hit by a truck. He is the 4th victim of the strange incidents that has been occurring at the company that resulted in 3 deaths. However, all of the victims had one thing in common other than working in the same company, which was that all of them had a music box given to them as a gift.
A story about the bonding of ex-lovers. One day Hyung Soo becomes the dog of his ex-girlfriend Go Eun. How will he be able to get his girlfriend back?
A story of a romance between two fans, blossomed by their shared love for an idol while they frequent a coffee shop, transcending mere brand promotion to forge an empathetic bond with the public.
Romance of a busy job-seeker student in his 20's.

primary_title: Those Who Pass Through Gimpo City

plot: Nano Fighters LOKAPA is the story of four heroes who eliminate virus monsters that have infiltrated human bodies. LOKAPA is a name from LOKAPALA, the protector of humanity. It is the world's first children's SFX drama featuring the superhero who protects humanity against the attacks of virus monsters in the human body. When the virus penetrates into the human body, the Nano Fighters LOKAPA reduces the body to nanoscale size to fight the virus inside the body, and when the virus monsters outside the body become huge, the LOKAPA heroes ride the Giant robot and destroy the monster.
Yoon Hee Yeol dreams of being a singer. Yoo Eun Ho is an aspiring writer. These college students and their friends try to find the way towards their dreams.

Ha Eun's girlfriend breaks up with her because she's scared of people knowing she's a lesbian. After a push from her best friend, Ha Eun meets Min Seo on a dating app. The two of them do all of the things on Ha Eun's list of dates that she never got to do with her ex. After spending time together, will Ha Eun be able to get over her ex and move on?

Is IZ*ONE's Lee Chae Yeon, who is in charge of beauty for the "Street Women Fighters", really dating SF9's Cha Ni, the gorgeous idol/actor?. A pretty girl meets a handsome guy on a "secret" date. Their sweet and turbulent "Secret" date. Cha Ni and Chae Yeon - their great chemistry gave birth to a romantic comedy.

Se-na, who once dreamed of becoming a war correspondent, became an entertainment reporter digging gossips of celebrities. She hates her job but she has no choice since she must pay rent. Her inner conflict deepens as her boss asks her to even spy on celebrities while her boyfriend disapproves of her career choice. Will she settle with reality or risk everything to be free to achieve her dream?

In the romantic comedy 'Please Remember, Princess,' Sungyeol plays the character Gi Yeok, an engineering major who devotes all of his love in order to win over his ideal type Min Ah. Jihyun plays Min Ah, who is a dance major and in the drama club. The drama will be based on the sensational story 'The Love Story of an Engineering Student.'

Can you find someone whom you saw once in a city with a population of 10 million people? A young Dutch man, Jan, flies 8000 km from the Netherlands to Seoul in search of the girl he fell in love with at first sight. He wanders into Itaewon, a neighborhood known for its large population of foreigners and diversity, and meets unique Koreans, such as Kim Jung Nam, the legendary owner of restaurants in Itaewon, an oddball named Man Doo, and his beautiful stewardess sister, Ha Yeong, who go out of their way to help Jan find his love.
Four kid detectives solving various cases happening at school.

Baek Sa Eon, a former presidential spokesman, marries Hong Hui Ju, a mute newspaper heiress, in an arranged union. When Hui Ju is kidnapped, their distant relationship is challenged as they navigate the crisis.

primary_title: He Is from the North After All

plot: The drama depicts various romantic episodes with the opposite sex that take place as the main character who just entered college, leads his college life.

primary_title: Ridiculous, But the Law of Maintenance

plot: "Pro, Teen" is an omnibus school-themed web-drama about students who choose vocational high school to chase their dreams where they are growing up by solving various concerns and difficulties. Shin Ha Neul is a first grade student at Design Communication Department that has a huge passion in drawing.

primary_title: The Guys I Want to Catch
plot: Four rookie cops in Noryangjin, who failed their police exams, are known to all as 'The F-4'. That's 'F', as in 'Failure'. Witness them pursuing criminals who have violated the law in varying ways. Do the bad guys even need to worry 'The F-4' is hot on their trails?.

Dok Go Ma Te is good looking and he uses this to his advantage. He begins a journey where 10 women affect his life. Through his journey he grows up and realizes what is important and who is the right woman for him.

The Romantic Movement: Seoul is a four part drama series compiled in 9 episodes. Each part is directed by a different director, two of which are very popular - Kang Chul Woo who is famous for the movie Romantic Island, and Park Hyun Jin who directed Lovers of 6 Years. The series owes tribute to the book which it is based on: The Romantic Movement by Alain de Botton. The series cohesively tells the story of a girl named Hyo Rin (Min Hyorin), a girl constantly plagued by love. After losing someone close to her heart, she must learn to love again. The first installment is titled My Bloody Valentine, the second is My Sweet Blanket, and the third, The Tarot Players. Other characters who frequently appear on the show include Yeo Wook Hwan (Ja Myung Go), Sohn Byung Wook (Private Eye), Defconn, a hip hop artist starring himself, and Jung Jun II from Mate, the rock band. Be sure to check out this beautifully-crafted series.

Yoon Seop, who is once again relentlessly messing around in an attempt to write an amazing scenario today. But his sister Yoon Joo delivers a brutal reality check. A verbal assault that calmly shatters his mental defenses at once, piece by piece.
19-year-old, aspiring actress Ahn Sa Rang. A coming-of-age drama about a girl growing into a mature adult and a celebrated actress.

Jin Seo Yun, Uee, Seol In Ah, and Park Ju Hyun challenging a triathlon that requires swimming, cycling, and marathon without stopping and is an event that requires extreme physical strength and strong endurance.

Kim Jae Eun is a student that gets high grades and is a nice person, her twin brother Kim Jae Deok unlike Jae Eun he gets bad grades and he's playful. Jae Eun is in love with his childhood friend Ji Won, Ji Won shares the same feelings but they can't get closer because Jae Deok is possesive of her sister and thinks that Ji Won doesn't deserve Jae Eun.

The story of saving islanders who are on the verge of losing their lives from mermaid hunters in Guyaguk, while Yoo Jin, who was once a naval general but exiled to the island and became captain of a fishing boat, and Shinjikki, a mermaid who sees the future, share a fateful.
A Sitcom about a middle aged household head, a mother and a competent career woman.
Four women started selling adult products door-to-door in a rural village in 1992, a time when "sex" was still taboo.
Seoyun ends up on a sharehouse with three men and one woman after taking a break form university and finding her dish. She notices that someone keeps stealing her ramen.

primary_title: Today Was Another Nam Hyun Day
plot: An ordinary high school student and Ramyun lover, Shin Nam Hyun, a masterpiece of Ramyun eating in peace.

primary_title: Something Between Us, Comic Book Cafe No. 2
plot: Yong Ji wants to get a part-time job at the manhwa cafe where our previous heroes worked. The boss immediately warns that he does not like office romances and must be able to separate personal and work, Yong Ji agreed with this. But the girl did not expect to meet the guy of her dreams, whom they had already encountered once.

primary_title: Something Between Us, Comic Book Cafe
plot: Something Between Us, Comic Book Café is a South Korean web series. It follows Yoomi beginning her story at a comic book café. Her work is enjoyable with handsome Dongkyu by her side. What happens when her story takes a turn as a love triangle trope gets thrown in her way for her dreamy workplace romance?
Soo Yeon will take her college entrance exam soon. She is bad at math so her mother hires a teacher to prepare her for college entrance exam.
A horror anthology series in which 10 film directors show off their directing skills based on bizarre stories from Korea, Asia and Europe. However, the place and time of the stories are in Korea.

Cha Dae Hyun works as an auto mechanic. He has a strong passion and talent for working on cars. Thanks to his grandfather, who ran a car repair shop in the countryside, he developed his love for cars. With his personal life, Cha Dae Hyun has a crush on Noh Yu Hwa, but he is shy about expressing his feelings to her. She works as a manager at the car repair center where Cha Dae Hyun works. She has a charming personality, but she also carries an emotional scar that she can't forget.

A romantic comedy about the misunderstandings and mishaps that occur when a student on the job hunt accidentally loses her phone. Choi Soo Yeon is a spirited college student who lives with her uncle after her parents passed away in a car accident when she was young. Kye Han Sol is a charming café owner who is aloof but well-mannered, while Yoo In Hae is a musical diva who dotes on Choi Soo Yeon as if she were her own daughter.
The web-drama "Sugar Coating" is a growth romance drama of five young people who have difficulty in love and tells the story of finding sincerity in a relationship entangled with sweet lies.

Scott is a part-time student and son of a famous dumpling shop in Zero City, accidentally picks up a geostone from the sky, one day while making a delivery. Albert, is a scientist and alien whose hobby is creating new monsters, to create more kaiju. He targets the geostones and sends his space kaiju to Earth to create space monsters that he has created. Concerned that the Earth is in danger from these space monsters. V a space police officer, sees Scott's courage in defending his village and gives Scott a belt that allows him to transform into a Rise Man!. As the Rise Man, Scott fights against various monsters who want to destroy the Earth and take the Geostones to destroy the Earth and claim the Geostones.
'Super Smart Quiz Show' is an IT education web drama about three high school students' experience while experiencing future technologies such as AI, IoT, and 6G through a quiz show.
A web drama about students at Sungkyunkwan University.
Four unlikely love stories interconnect in this Korean web drama about growing up and finding yourself-and maybe your soulmate.
Two women are driven to the brink, facing an inescapable reality that forces them to consider murder as their only way out.

In 1994, college students were crazy about basketball and Korea's hip-hop artists; with students from various countryside areas attending college in Seoul, they mingle together for true friendship, love and lots of fun at a boarding house.

Im Seung Hee (Lee Young Ah) scribbles her days away in hopes of becoming a drama writer, but there are a few things holding her back from her big break: specifically, she's broke and lives off of unemployment benefits. Things get tricky when Seung Hee's first love, Kim Jong Dae (Nam Goong Min), ends up working at the benefit office, but this embarrassing encounter just may turn out to be the story of a lifetime. While it may seem that the trouble with being a writer is being a paid one, Seung Hee needs to learn a thing or two about the biggest hurdle of all: living a love story worth telling.

32 years old for woman is an age which may be little too late to start something new or little too early to give up something. The 'future-self' comes to 'me' today and gives advices about life and marriage. The future-self is trying to bring better life by helping her to meet a perfect spouse.

A story that unfolds between the Japanese colonial era and the division of Korea. Kang San is from a poor family. Fight your way out of poverty. Thanks to basketball, he triumphs and meets an upper-class girl.
A 24-year-old woman isolates herself from society after losing her will to live. A week before his death, his first love and childhood friend Ram Woo appears to him as a soul reaper.

A college student struggling with friendship starts a new job as a convenience store only to find out that the owners are fairies. The fairies only have one condition for their workers and that is that they have to tell the fairies all of their worries. Together the part timer and the fairies work to find happiness.

primary_title: Temptation of the Wife of Heirs Over Flowers
Teacher, Would You Like to Date Me?
plot: Asked by a friend to teach his sister, he was taken aback when she falls in love with him and confess her love, Teacher, would you date me? How will he reject her confession, especially when she doesn't know how to give up and keep trying to win his heart?

A drama about a housekeeper Park Bok Nyeo, who gets hired to work for a family which has just lost its mother, leaving just the father and 4 children. But, she's strange. She is unsociable housekeeper who is perfect in what she does around the house but doesn't smile or show her feelings due to her mysterious past. Bok Nyeo will help the family healing process and rebuild their bonds.

Chae Yong-Joo, a former special forces member and top salesperson at a liquor company, must sell a new beer to save her store from closing. She meets a sensitive brewmaster, Yoon Min-Joo, while competing with manager Bang A-Reum.

Fleeing an arranged marriage to a man she doesn't love, In Hui meets Gi Hyeon, an aspiring musician whose most prized possession is his late father's saxophone. In Hui and Gi Hyeon cross paths over the years and slowly fall in love. In Hui ends up in the radio business working for Yeong Jin, a Korean national who supports the Japanese government in its occupation of Korea. As Gi Hyeon's musical career begins to take off, he discovers that Yeong Jin is the same man who murdered his father many years before. As the tension builds, Gi Hyeon is suspiciously sent to work hard labor at a coal mine in Japan. Upon the Japanese defeat in World War II, Gi Hyeon returns home, full of revenge, to find his life turned upside down.

Hyung Woo used to work for the law firm in South Korea, but due to a case his life has changed. He now works as a lawyer specializing in appeals. His rate of wins are very low. He deals with cases which can not be won by law, but he helps his clients by using illegal ways.

primary_title: The Birth of a Married Woman
plot: The drama tells stories about wedding planning with a great deal of details that nobody has told you so far.
7 siblings, all of whom are orphans and not blood-related, love each other more than real siblings. They go through many hardships together. Challenges then wait in the seafood industry.
Kang Yong-ki is still hurt by his previous relationship when he falls in love with Na In-jung, who has a relationship with another man, putting them in a complicated love triangle.
Internal strife ensues for two decades as three family members vie for control over a large South Korean conglomerate.

Bong Dal Hee (Lee Yo Won) is a first year resident doctor who strives to become a surgeon despite her heart problem. She works under Dr. Ahn Jong Geun (Lee Bum Soo), a cardiac specialist, and even though they don't get off to a good start, the two grow fond of each other as time goes by. Dr. Lee Geon Wook (Kim Min Joon) divorced his wife, Dr. Jo Moon Kyung (Oh Yoon Ah), after he found out that his 6-year-old son was actually fathered by another man before they married. He still has feelings for her, but feels betrayed and cheated. This medical drama portrays the lives of resident doctors, their ups and downs, depicting crisis in a hospital as well as politics among its management staff.

A Medical drama about the life of a low-class veterinarian of that era who was a horse doctor then becoming a high official as a court physician in charge of the king's health in the late period of the Joseon Dynasty.

primary_title: The Dolphin in the Little Mermaid
plot: When I was a little girl... I thought I was the main character of my life and the world revolves around me. But?. Eun So is the most popular boy in class. His best friend is Eun Young, an introverted girl. However, since a short while his best friend is avoiding him. He does not know what to do to reconcile with his friend.

Young baseball player Young Kwang and wealthy rival In Woo are injured, meeting nurse Jae In. Young Kwang and Jae In bond over poverty, developing feelings, but her past secrets and In Woo's interest complicate their budding romance.

Jeon Woo Chi based on classical novel of unknown origin dating to the Joseon era that tells the story of a free-wheeling, mischievous Jeon Woo Chi, who swallowed the gumiho's fox bead, which gave him powers of Taoist magic. He uses those powers to save the poor, oppressed people and becomes a hero.
A sad story of how the power struggle, female rivalry and a mystical omen destroyed the kingdom.
A fast moving KDrama about the lives of doctors, residents and administrative personal at the Korea Hospital in Oby/Gyn, Pediatrics and Radiology departments.

primary_title: The Escape Story of a Plastic Spoon

plot: Depicts the lives of people with different backgrounds of growth, living in a single-person house.

Tae Gong Shil gets the request from ghosts to find a way to warm the hearts of everyone in the world. With the help of Kang Woo, who introduces her to Kim Tan, Tae Gong Shil is able to get the help of Cha Eun Sang. Cha Eun Sang asks the question "When do people's hearts become warm?" on her social network account: various characters and idols answer in different ways that music warms their hearts.

How much is your life worth ? What can prove a person's worth ? By what metrics? A romance drama that tells the story of Yoon Ji Hwa, an insurance lawyer who dreams of a fateful love, and Ji Jung Eun, a young woman who has given up on life.

primary_title: The Temperature of Sophisticated Golden My-Way
plot: An average girl, Yoo Sang Ah, who dreams of a romantic relationship on campus. Next to her is a close friend who sometimes feels like a boyfriend, a friend since they were babies, named Choi Han Gyeol. They say they're just friends but all their friends know them to be a couple. But one day, a new guy appears. His name is Nam Shin. And Nam Shin's younger sister, Dior. These two come between Sang Ah and Han Gyeol who were really close to becoming a couple. Will these two be able to get past this storm, tsunami and earthquake like crisis and discover their true feelings for each other?
Two lovers who get into a sad but rather realistic conflict during their trip to Jeju Island.

primary_title: There's Light at the Tip of My Fingernails
The Secret of the Grand Mansion: The Missing Girls
plot: "The Secret of the Grand Mansion: The Missing Girls" features ten members of WJSN - Seola, EXY, Bona, Soobin, Luda, Dawon, Eunseo, Yeoreum, Dayoung, and Yeonjung - seen drifting on an empty planet after an inexplicable horror derailed their travel to an awards ceremony. With the girls finding the Grand Mansion, the story begins as their curiosity is piqued with traces of someone in the mansion.

Dal-Soo (Bong Tae-Gyu) was once a promising runner. His parents suddenly died in an accident. Afterwards, Dal-Soo was traumatized by their deaths and he quit running. Now, Dal-Soo stays in his room and he hardly ever goes out. He has his younger sister Dal-Hee (Son Dam-Bi), who supports him. One day, Dal-Soo suddenly dies in his room. Mysterious soccer referees then appear in front of him. They give Dal-Soo loss time. Sun-Ho (Im Ji-Kyu) lives with his mother. He has a part-time job and he is preparing to find a better job. One day, he gets into an accident and dies. Mysterious soccer referees then appear in front of him. They give Sun-Ho loss time.

One day, a stationery store in front of an elementary school is struck by a lightning and a mysterious thing happens. It will tell the story about how the children using the powers of lightning, protect the mysterious future energy and fight the villains.
Young people cannot forget their first love and freeze when they see the clock at 1:11.

primary_title: To You Who Begins to Love
plot: A film about money versus love. Young people say they need money, not dreams. But the dreams that they ignore very much include love.
Lee Se-hee never thought she'd be part of the popular clique in high school, and neither did she expect herself to be in a love square with 3 very attractive popular guys. Who is she going to choose?

An office romance web drama that deals with the small romance that is likely to occur in a relationship of a beginner in society. It deals with the sweet and bitter story of those who start their youth at the beginning of love with a company and a reading group in the background.

"Us in Your Distance" is a special drama by KBS to raise awareness about those living with disabilities. It tells the story of Seung Mo, a high schooler with autism struggling to find a job due to his disability.

There is a small cafe in the corner of a quiet alley. Although it's isolated, people can still find it. It gets busy on days with good weather. Yeon Soo runs this small cafe. One morning he's cleaning when he discovers a potentilla growing out from in between two rocks. Then he meets Yoo Ri who runs a stall and asks Yeon Soo if she can sell things outside his store. Yeon Soo says yes. He then falls for Yoo Ri more and more. A man appears at the stall one day. Yeon Soo can see Yoo Ri is happy with this man. Yeon Soo gets close and friendly with a group of young people and decides to give up his feelings for Yoo Ri.

Four prisoners on death row wake up in a bizarre world and realize that someone is controlling their lives. In the 93 days stuck in the island, they destroy countless infectious agents and eventually survive. However, now, they are killing one another.
A-very-short and comedic web drama about a guy who has terrible luck, and the hilarious trials and tribulations he faces.

A "will-they-won't-they" relationship (ssum) of a person who hasn't dated in 20 years. Your imagination becomes reality? Even in a beginning-of-the-semester party? There's always a person who ruins the atmosphere in college beginning-of-the-semester parties, but there are also campus romances (Please). Will Soram's imagination finally become reality?

primary_title: X: Endline, New Beginning, New World
plot: Inssa Oppa Special Episode - X: Endline, New Beginning is a mystery survival web entertainment full of tension that engages in a fierce brain battle. Minhyuk and Hyungwon collaborate with ASTRO Jinjin, Moonbin, Rocky, and Sanha to provide a different kind of fun. Here's eight Gmarket workers who walked in to reach its leader position of new TF team. Yet there's always unexpected circumstances.
Among 7.9 billion people in the world. Where is my half who will warm up my heart...?
Seven short stories with different idol band.

South Korean television series about a street vendor who designs jewelry family and her encounters with a rich family that owns a jewelry business. Standard mistaken identity and hilarity ensues melodrama.
Young and successful CEO Ma In-tak offers to pass on a KRW10 billion inheritance to his future wife.

Maeng Gong-Hee is a designer at J-Fashion. Her wealthy childhood friend, Gu Dan-Soo, returns to Korea and is now her neighbor. He faced hardships after his mother left him as a child. Can the two of them reconnect and find happiness?

Temporary employee Ms. Kim (Kim Hye-Soo) is a remarkable woman. She possesses highly advanced skills in seemingly all work fields. She's also highly confident and always sticks to her ideals. Jang Kyu-Jik (Oh Ji-Ho) is a hot-shot foreign educated MBA, hired to turn around a flagging corporation. As they begin work together at their new jobs, can they ever co-exist?

Love story of Cha Dong Joo, a man who's been rendered deaf after an accident but pretends he can hear, and Bong Woo Ri, a woman who's intelligent but pretends she's dim-witted to protect the dignity of her mentally handicapped father.
General Gye-Baek of Baekje and his 5,000 soldiers go up against the Silla and Tang Dynasties. Their combined forces are 10 times the size of Bekjae's army.

Lee Jang Suk spent some time in a juvenile detention center for stealing wallets from unsuspecting strangers. After he gets out, he meets a sports agent, Nam Jae Il, who's trying to recover from a downfall in his carrier. Together, they work to achieve their dreams.

Born as the third prince, Chung Nyeong, was far from ascending the throne. His early years were turbulent as Korea faced political tensions from both within and abroad and facing abduction as a boy to make matters worse. Eventually, the young prince finds himself living in a private residence outside of the palace and experiences the everyday life of commoners until he is a young man. Later on his ascension to the throne, Chung Nyeong (now called King Se Jong) stabilizes the newly born country and gives rise to the blooming culture of Joseon. In the process, he invents Hangul, the Korean writing system.

Jang Pan Soo is a meticulous character who has unwavering focus on the subject of his attention, but tends to trip up at the crucial moment. This Drama tell the story about a group of young people who work towards launching a business and achieving success.
The drama is about the discords and meanings of a family seen though the eyes of a child.
A team of elite doctors treats patients while dealing with power struggles within the hospital

Hyunhaetan Marriage War is co-production between South Korea and Japan. Dae Cheon and Takako are lovers who decide to get married. However, Dae Cheon's father, who is a fishing boat captain, dislikes the Japanese while Takako's father has an unfavorable opinion of Korea. So Dae Cheon teaches Takako how to talk in a heavy, folksy Korean accent and tells her to limit what she says to his father to only four words. He then introduces Takako to his father under the name "Choi Do Ja", which is a girl's name in Korea. Thinking that Takako is Korean, his father approves of their marriage. But later on, Dae Cheon's father learns that Takako is Japanese and becomes infuriated.

Case Cell Division is a special drama that recounts the various desires of people living in fake life tamed by SNS, and the conflict and harm caused by it. It depicts the process of protagonists living in false exaggerated lives like countless advertisements and videos randomly spreading through SNS, seeking their true self and real love.

A crime factual drama that captures the other side of the crime such as CCTV footage, black box videos, social media posts, and cell phone videos that someone filmed, from multiple perspectives. It looks at crime realistically through the eyes of society rather than from the perspective of victims and perpetrators.

Na Eun Jin (Han Hye Jin) is a hardworking, positive, and bright woman who encounters feeling of disappointment because of her cheating husband (Lee Sang Woo) and other events, which makes her find the new side of herself. Meanwhile, Yoo Jae Hak (Ji Jin Hee) is a successful CEO, respectable father of two sons, and husband to his devoted wife (Kim Ji Soo). He thought he was happy in his life until he finds himself attracted to Eun Jin and then he begins to reflect on his life and conflicts between responsibility to family and his feelings for Eun Jin.
Depicts the story of a female protagonist who calmly practices scrutiny when faced with a moment when it is necessary in daily life, but for some reason shrinks in front of love.

During the Japanese colonial rule era, Moo Gil and Il Ae are childhood friends and each other's first love. Against their wills, both Moo Gil and Il Ae have to leave Hapcheon, South Korea, and go to Hiroshima, Japan. They are separated from each other there. Then in 2019 in South Korea, Moo Gil receives a birthday letter from his first love Il Ae.
When a company faces dissolution, salesmen Han and Yun have three months to wrap up deals. An incident brings them closer, changing Yun's initially distant demeanor.

International student Jay comes to Korea for college. He struggles with fitness until personal trainer Jin Uk takes an interest in helping him, much to Jay's friend Seong Hun's dismay. Suspicions arise that Jin Uk may be linked to a crime.
"Jump. Jump. Jump!" follows the story of an inspiring idol, Joong Won, an idol trainee, Yuri, and their best friends 'Jae Min' and 'Hye Yun', who are also working toward their dreams.

primary_title: Let Free the Curse of Taekwondo
plot: High schooler Do Hoe's life brightens when he meets cheerful Ju Yeong, but his oppressive father's ways strain their bond. Years later, their deep connection mends scars after being torn apart.

Geu Rim is a student at an arts high school who dreams of becoming a pop singer. At school She gets a new roommate, Irene who's actually a boy. Irena's persona is a pretty Female CF star and his actual name is Hyun Woo.

primary_title: The Woman Who Married Three Times
plot: Oh Hyun Soo (Uhm Ji Won) and Oh Eun Soo (Lee Ji Ah) are two grown sisters trying to make it in the world under the watchful eye of their mother. While Hyun Soo focuses intently on her career as a product designer, Eun Soo sets out to kindle romance after her divorce from her first husband, Jung Tae Won (Song Chang Ui). But can her new beau, business management school graduate student Kim Joon Goo (Ha Suk Jin), accept a young divorcee as his new bride?

Four single people: happily divorced paralegal Lee Soo-kyung (Lee Soo-kyung), mysterious gourmand Goo Dae-young (Yoon Doo-joon), design student and former rich girl Yoon Jin-yi (Yoon So-hee), and petty lawyer Kim Hak-moon (Shim Hyung-tak). Who enjoy living alone, except for that pesky problem that dining out is not designed for one. At Jin-yi's request, she, Soo-kyung and Dae-young start eating out together and thus get involved in each other's lives.
A little girl must face changes in her family, when her single Dad brings home a new Mom for her.
A conservative government party member falls for the fiesty young leader of an upstart liberal party in this Korean romantic comedy.
To insure the inheritance of their family business, parents of four girls decide to raise their youngest daughter as a boy.
When a comet falls onto Earth in 2013, strange things start happening to the Noh family and their neighbours.

Ji Seok and Do Jin meet Hyeon Woo during high school at a judo competition between high schools in Seoul. Hyeon Woo, who is obsessed with fighting despite knowing that he will get hurt, uses reckless techniques against his opponent to win. In the end, Hyeon Woo ends up on a stretcher, but he can't hide his joy at the feeling of having managed to win. Ji Seok and Do Jin are curious about Hyeon Woo from that day on. Do Jin follows Hyeon Woo to the same school and meets Hyeon Woo again at the judo club. As the elite prospect of a family of judo medalists, Do Jin, who swept the current judo championship, is bullied by the jealous superiors of the judo club. Hyeon Woo wisely saves Do Jin, and in the process, the two become close. Ji Seok approaches Hyeon Woo with the intention of being a friend and ends up becoming a lover. Do Jin is called to a competition between athletes in a situation where he is falling in love with Hyeon Woo. Hyeon Woo, who receives Do Jin's confession before leaving for the competition, rejects his confession and prays for Do Jin's Olympic victory. Six years later, Do Jin, who became a gold medalist, meets again with Hyeon Woo and Ji Seok, who are in their third year of college, and are struggling with their time together.

Set in the Joseon period, Ok Tae-Young is an attorney with a secret identity. Her name, her husband, and her status are all fake. She meets Cheon Seung-Hwi, a traveling storyteller who falls in love with her at first sight.

A drama about four best friends, radio DJ Park So Hyeon, cosmetic company CEO Shim Eun Jin, plastic surgeon Yoon Ji Min, and import car dealer Shin Joo Ah. The show focuses on the fresh, lively tales of these four women, and takes a reality-show or mockumentary approach. The show features interviews with the characters throughout the show.

A drama about love and relationships, centers on a college student Joo Yeon Ae who has both good looks and personality, but she is actually a novice in relationships, and always fails at getting her man.

Beyond simply reversing the gender roles and substituting a female for the male main character from the original film, My Boss, My Hero, this drama deals with the serious issues of personal growth and family relationships in contemporary society through its comedic approach to gangsters and the three main characters' growing friendship.

Madoka is transferred to the secretarial pool when the company goes through restructuring. It's a letdown after being in the busy Sales Department, but Madoka tries to find her place there. She meets and falls in love with Haruki, a security guard, but trouble rears its head in the form of Kaori, Haruki's ex-girlfriend.

Ten employees in a company drift off to an inhabited island after an accident that occurred at sea during their company trip. Since all ten employee were drunk before the accident occurred, they have no recollection of how they came to be stranded on the island. This sitcom follows the journey that these characters go through and how they survive on this stranded island called Keu Keu Island.

Three women live their lives all on separate roads. One woman is an aspiring scriptwriter, another is a successful couple manager, while the third woman is jobless and aspires to be a famous chef. After not seeing one another for years, the friends are reunited as they each attend a "blind date" event hosted by the couple manager, Suh Hye-Jin. From this point on these women are reunited as friends but things quickly get complicated as they become involved with each other's love interests. The drama unfolds as the girlfriends are there for each other during break ups and hook ups... Each girl realizes what is most important to them as they learn a little bit about themselves and as they discover what friendship truly means.

Here comes the story of a heart-warming and down-to-earth modern family. Duk Hwa, a former celebrity who married a hot wife who is 20 years younger than him. Keum Pyo, a first-born daughter in her second marriage after a failure of her first. Eun Pyo, a second daughter who's down-to-earth and born to love a man. Dong Pyo, a bigmouth phony-baloney living his restless youth. These outrageous members reveal their stories as their family feud unfolds.
A coastal journey exploring beach jobs and local seafood delights. Watch Yum Jung-ah, Ahn Eun-jin, Park Jun-myun, and DEX embark on a fun-filled seaside adventure across the country.

Sunghoon and Euntae have opposite personalities, always bicker when they meet, and 4 years later, when they receive an unknown package, they return to their high school days with their souls changed and meet their old friend Doah.

Oh Deok Hoon, who majored in psychic science at MIT and served as a researcher at the National Forensic Service, suddenly opened a licensed real estate agent to solve strange and mysterious cases related to his home. What is Deok Hoon's special ability? And why did he start being a licensed real estate agent?

Here, dazzling teenagers from all over the world gather to receive professional training at Starlight Academy, crossing the boundaries of language and culture and igniting the stage with their talent and passion. Through fierce competition and teamwork, they will compete for the opportunity to become a globally recognized super idol. Let's witness how they are born from the starlight and become trendsetting stars!

"Project 7" is an 'assembly, strengthening' audition program that breaks away from the audition format in which viewers mainly participated by voting, directly selecting participants for each round from the first round, forming a new team, and growing their favorite participants through the process. It is a differentiated new concept idol audition program that introduces the concept of "Project 7", a new concept idol assembly reinforcement audition scheduled to be aired on JTBC in October, is open to all 'men who dream of becoming top-tier idols' without restrictions on affiliation, experience, age, nationality, etc.

primary_title: Mina, You Changed Your Profile Picture Again
plot: The humorous and realistic tale of Mina, a 29-year-old single woman questioning the direction of her life. As her friends settle down in marriage and she navigates through failed relationships in her twenties, Mina finds herself frequently switching between boyfriends and profile pictures. Will she rediscover the capacity to love?

"Sent From Heaven" describes the various episodes of Taoist faires: a mother and her daughter. They happen to become grounded and must deal with their new predicament. Fairy mother Wang-Mo (Shim Hye-Jin) and her daughter Chae-Hwa (Hwang Woo Seul Hye) go down to the ground to have a bath at a hot spring, before Chae-Hwa is to get married. They see a bunch of extras for some kind of filming session and they are wearing fairy outfits like what Wang-Mo and Chae-Hwa wears. After taking their bath, they put on their fairy outfit. The try to go back up, but find themselves still grounded. Se-Joo (Cha In-Pyo) is the president of 2H Entertainment. He lives with his 2 children and his twin brother. Se-Joo's son Kook-Min (Park Min-Woo), wants to become an actor, even though his acting skills are poor. Se-Joo's daughter Na-Ra (Woo Ri) is a model student. One day, Se-Joo visits a film shooting set which is financed by 2H Entertainment. Se-Joo becomes upset after discovering his son Kook-Min is taking part in the filming without his knowledge. Along the way, Se-Joo happens to steal a glance at fairy mother Wang-Mo and her daughter Chae-Hwa taking a bath. He finds Chae-Hwa attractive, but leaves. Fairy mother Wang-Mo and her daughter Chae-Hwa go to the film shooting site to find their fairy outfits. They are handed the business for 2H Entertainment and told to go there to find their fairy costumes.
Six women, called Queen Bees, form teams with three men each in a competitive show inspired by bees. Eighteen men compete to impress the Queen Bees for a chance to win $100,000.

A world where material things are recognized more than people, and looks and money are more trusted than the heart. Good body, good looks, etc. So now, this society has become very harsh and harsh, regardless of whether it is adults or children. It wasn't who we were originally. We were kind-hearted, generous people who knew how to live together. This program teaches our children living today that although the world is not easy, there is always brightness for those who work hard, and by overcoming and experiencing such difficulties, they grow into solid adults.

A rural island bachelor, Bong Chul-Hee, is not the ideal candidate to get married. A public civil servant, Jung Ha-Na, doesn't believe in marriage, but is on a "Marriage Recruitment" team that is tasked to be a matchmaker for Chul-Hee.

A 30-something office worker lives her predictable life with learned survival skills and comfort food. Her world is shaken when a handsome new colleague arrives and a long-time coworker's attitude shifts, leading to office love triangle.
A variety show where the hosts visit ordinary citizens during their brief moments of free time, aiming to sprinkle a bit of luck into their lives.
A group of awkward townies who unexpectedly gain superpowers and fight villains threatening the peace of Haeseong city.
A reality show where participants travel across South Korea to look after homes of vacationing elderly families, completing assigned tasks left by the homeowners.

When disciplined stuntman Jae Yeon is tasked with training Do Ha, an irritable actor down on his luck, personalities clash as they do not get along. Yet as the two spend more time together, growing feelings complicate their relationship.

primary_title: Jung Kook: I Am Still the Original
original_title: <Jung Kook: I Am Still> the Original
plot: Jung Kook's solo debut single, unreleased interviews, backstage footage, and full live performance of "GOLDEN." Chronicles his journey while charting his own path despite his accomplishments and natural talent.

Kian84 has risen from webtoon artist to award-winning entertainer, but one childhood dream still remains-becoming a singer. To make it happen, Kian heads to America, the land of free spirits, to find musical inspiration.
It tells the story of three very close friends, Yoon Jung-wan (Eugene), Kim Sun-mi (Kim Yoo-mi) and Kwon Ji-hyun (Choi Jung-yoon), who are all 39 years old. They each have their own problems.
A wife is troubled when her socially and domestically perfect lawyer husband falls in love with another woman and her sister-in-law's college junior.
The turbulent lives of the sisters Hyo-sun and Mi-sun, whose fates have been reversed.
A teen outsider becomes manager of a secretive app revealing schoolmates' secrets. Joining the popular clique, she develops a romance with a seemingly perfect heartthrob hiding his own secret.

A model student, once focused solely on grades, faces domestic abuse and school bullying. Joining forces with a classmate, he forms "High School Heroes," a group that fights back against bullies on behalf of the victims.
Lawyer Lee Han-shin (Go Soo) becomes the final judge of prisoners and a 'parole officer' who stops people with bad conscience.
Desperate Mrs. Seonju tells the story of Seon-ju, a woman who is desperate to start over after her bad marriage is destroyed.

Kim Hyung Joon, owner of a small cosmetics company and riddled with debts, decides to sponsor a contestant for 'Miss Korea' hoping that will help promote their products, and so he turns to Oh Ji Young the girl he broke up 10 years before.

Hardcore prosecutor Lee Tae Sung (Kim Kang Woo) takes a deep dive when he goes undercover to take down an infamous crime syndicate in Haeundae, Busan. Things are looking good for justice, up until Tae Sung loses his memory in an accident. In a turn of slapstick comedy, Tae Sung, now convinced he's a gangster, sets to terrorizing the waterfront town in true form, eventually falling for the ultimate mob princess Go Sora (Jo Yeo Jeong): a former kingpin's daughter.

Do Min-Joon, an alien that came to our planet 400 years ago, will be able to return to his planet in 3 months, but when he meets famous actress Chun Song-Yi, all the centuries he spent distancing himself from humans come to an end.

A young woman in her 20's does everything she can to find true love, only for one night to ruin her hopes of finding a decent guy. Before she can give up, though her best friend unknowingly reunites Kim Hye Rim with an old flame but at what cost.
Yongcheonru is the grandest guesthouse in Joseon. Their motto is that the customer is the king. Yeongcheonru has four new interns and they have their own reasons why they work there.

From his very first day at his new school, Jin U attracts everyone's attention. Among them is Tae Seop, who approaches Jin U out of curiosity. As his curiosity grows uncontrollable, rumors begin spreading at school.
A South Korean adaptation of the TV series "Barney and Friends".
When workaholic CEO Kang Ji-yun hires a kind-hearted single father as her secretary, an unexpected bond grows within their professional relationship.

Tomoko and Satoshi, who got married after the great love affair, start a sweet newly-married life of only two people. At that time, Satoshi's older brother, Haruo, suddenly ordered an American relocation order, so his three daughters, Mari, Hanabi, Chieko, and his mother-in-law are suddenly living with them.

Hyun-jung, former bodybuilder and struggling gym owner, helps Mi-ran, a heartbroken woman, rebuild her life and body. As they train together, they form an unexpected bond that helps them heal, grow, and face life's challenges side by side.

The collapse of teachers' Authority, the establishment of the Teachers' Authority Protection Bureau under the Ministry of Education, and the dispatch of supervisors to problem schools to punish students and parents who cross the line.
Koo Ha Na learns she was raised by enemies of her real parents. Reborn for revenge, she encounters Hwang Jin Gu, CEO who gradually develops compassion for her after a poor first impression.

Choi Eun-seol (Choi Jeong-yun) is a researcher at cosmetics company and a young married woman who is cheerful, lively and has strong curiosity. Although been betrayed and deeply hurt, she insists on finding her own love and happiness.
K-pop stars manage rival clubs, drafting trainees for a league-style audition. Teams compete, trade members, and vie for the Prism Cup. Winning group debuts as a boy band.

After a broken engagement, Ji Song-yi (Jun So-min) finds her life taking a sharp turn. As she struggles to pay off the mortgage on her newlywed home, she juggles several part-time jobs while trying to navigate life in a new city.
Focuses on campus students' friendship and life.

Eary from a decade-long routine, cartoonist Kian84 sets off on a global backpacking adventure with his actor friend and two popular YouTubers, exploring distant lands from the Andes to the African savanna.

Tired of every girl he's ever crushed on brushing him off for Sun U, the campus heartthrob, Jae Hyeon drunkenly agrees to Sun U's challenge of participating in a love battle between the two men, where the loser is the one to confess first.
The debut of Poker After Dark's Game of Gold, an exciting new poker game series that combines the competitiveness of high-stakes poker action with the excitement of reality TV.
