Four city dwellers swap modern comforts for a rustic cabin in remote Lapland, Finland, where they must chop wood, bathe in a river, and struggle together against the wilderness.

A boy who transfers schools a lot joins in a country school, thinking he will transfer soon he picks fight with senior and asks a girl (in the class) out. But he have to stay there till graduation and deal with things he messed up!!

Jaka, a policeman filled with revenge, teams up with his junior, Sekar, and three inmates to hunt down a serial killer. Their research slowly reveals the dark side of the justice system that they have always believed in.
A Korean variety show follows its cast as they explore South Korea in search of unique local treasures. Each episode features a new guest.
Forget the "jungle" of the past. It's coming to a "Survival" scene that has never been seen before and no production team has ever attempted it.

Kang Soo-hyeon's life is in ruins after a false accusation gets her fired from company. She wants to work again to support her husband and their hearing-impaired son. Soo-hyeon recruits former idol Yoo Jin-woo, who was recently dropped.
A king tasks a ghost-slayer and a woman cursed to hear ghosts with uncovering a sinister presence plaguing the crown prince's palace, leading them into a dark realm.

A Korean-American woman's ambition leads her to create a fake luxury brand, targeting the wealthy elite. As she navigates the world of high-end fashion and deception, her scheme unfolds in this gripping crime mystery drama.

Im Pa-Rang, a former silver medalist diver, leaves his diving career behind after a traumatic experience. Seeking a fresh start, he joins the university swimming team, where he meets two men who will change his life forever.

It's been 4 years since the famous TVXQ group has debuted. With a concert coming up, stress levels are high and everyone is getting restless. All 5 are sent on vacation, to relieve stress and find themselves through their vacation.

During the Japanese control of Korea during WWII and before, they used Korea women as prostitutes for their Military Officers and Korean men as grunt soldiers to fight in the trenches during the war with the USA.

There's a 99.2% chance the world will end in 7 days. Hee Su decides to come out to his parents and get to know his crush, U Jin. U Jin believes that since there's a 0.8% chance the world won't end, life should go on as normal.

South Korea's perfect daughter and student, Ma Hae Ri! Shopping and receiving skin treatment as her favorite pastimes, Ma Hae Ri has finally succeeded in becoming a prosecutor. With a mind of an adolescent, and common senses not yet fully developed, her life of extreme ups and downs on the way to becoming a true prosecutor begins. Circling around her are two men: Suh In Woo and Yoon Se Joon. What is to become of this love triangle?
When Sue starts high school, everything becomes about friends, fun, and just wanting to be involved with someone--anyone.

A tycoon Lee Joong-Man murderd in 1998 by his personal driver Ji Se-Gwang whom having affair with Lee's mistress Eun Bi-Ryung. Lee's wife Park Gi-Soo wrongfully convicted of the murder of Lee. Ji Se-Gwang became a special inspection division manager at the Seoul Central District Prosecutors Office(SCDPO). A professional prosecutor Lee Cha-Don learns his past in relation to the conspiracy for the murder case.

Set during the reign of King Injong, the protagonist is a royal physician desperate to cure his ailing daughter. He becomes a fugitive when he gets entangled in an assassination plot to poison the crown prince, and fights to save both his daughter's life and his own.
Hip and edge animation that welcomes to a world of magic and imagination. With a little patience, determination and a flick of their magic wands, anything is possible.

primary_title: Gangster Like Me Got a Boyfriend
plot: A fallen idol befriends a gangster, only to learn his friend's father killed his family. He gets caught up in gang conflicts while grappling with this revelation.

Shin-Hye is a divorcee who lives with her mother and 2 daughters. Suk-Hwan is a widower who lives with his mother-in-law and 3 kids. Shin-Hye and Suk-Hwan fall in love and marry. Now, the two families will have to learn to live together.

Jin-Hee and Chang-Min marry young but get a divorce soon after when things between them turn bitter. Years later they meet again as interns in an ER, where they must deal with a demanding job and the antipathy still fresh between them.
Queen Wongyeong from a powerful family marries Yi Bang-Won, helping him become King Taejong. But their relationship deteriorates when he takes concubines and diminishes her influence.
A struggling student at Korea's worst high school forms a study group while protecting his classmates with his fighting skills, hoping to overcome academic challenges and secure a spot in college.
Two sisters, whose mother died in childbirth, face hardship with their ill father. After fate tears them apart, they grow up leading separate lives, unaware of each other's existence.

A disgraced neurosurgeon performs illegal surgeries while confronting her dark past. When she meets her former mentor, a battle of power and revenge unfolds as she pushes ethical boundaries in pursuit of medical breakthroughs.
They've known each other all their lives, but the 9 year age gap has made her like a big sister to the him. They land in bed one drunken night, beginning their amusing relationship.

This vacation reality program will feature young actors who are friends but have yet to go on a proper vacation together as they set off to an unknown destination. The group will visit Queensland, Australia to enjoy a relaxing vacation in an unfamiliar place. The cast members appear to have nothing specific in common but they're all alumni or friends of alumni of the Korea National University of Arts.

A young girls' trio escapes from a convent to meet boys in a disco. A young nun, So Yi Yoon, goes after them, who also investigates the murder of her sister, Lee Jin YU. Involved in the mix is the hated villain Jang Taejong, the grandmother Gong, and the Sister Maria.

About the turbulent period of chaos around 1960s when the scars due to the Korean War is still fresh. It is a crime noir drama about the rise and fall of friendship, desires, and betrayal of men who became heads of violent organizations across the country that shook the country in the days when money, power, and fists became one.

The Wang family faces a number of challenges: elitism; discrimination; children moving back home after living on their own during colleges; the power dynamics between husband, wife and family; and decisions about when to marry and have a baby given the financial difficulties in today's Korean society. The first daughter had married into a well-off family, but after they went bankrupt she and the family had to move back to her parents' home. The second daughter is also having financial difficulties as her husband is jobless, while the third daughter suddenly decided to quit her job. How will the family manage to survive such obstacles?
During King Muryeong's reign, his secret daughter Baek Hyang was denied princesshood. She later led Bimun, aiding Baekje's war. Her patriotism earned her a place in history for filial duty.
A young woman's father is a killer and she must deal with the tough times so she can plot her revenge.
Lee Tae-baek from Tongyeong who has a talent in drawing overcomes the the fact that he's only a high school graduate and becomes a sandwich man.
An average boy suddenly becomes a Dino Master and must join forces with his dinosaur pals to save the universe from an evil force.
Untypical Korean drama plot with 'no melodrama' about putting together an untypical Korean drama with no melodrama. Fast-paced and full of twists, revenge, greed and fun.
"Seo-Young, My Daughter" tells the story of a father who separates with his daughter, their love, hate and reconciliation.

This action packed thriller follows a covert Marines unit that once trailed Choi Hee Gon, maritime kingpin of a notorious crime syndicate. Team leader Kwon Jung Ryool was forced to abort his mission after Hee Gon slayed his wife and all the loved ones of the team's original members. Stranded, Kim Sun Woo, Jung Ryool's trusted young agent, has remained undercover. Years later, with Poseidon's reputation and credibility wrecked, Jung Ryool summons Sun Woo from the underworld and together, they set out to take down Hee Gon once and for all. More than a pretty face, Lee Soo Yoon joins the new team as a corporal who is not to be tampered with. An energetic series, Poseidon showcases Lee Si Young's real-life boxing skills.

Kim Shin's brother commits suicide after his company goes bankrupt, leaving his family debt-riddled and grieving. Learning the decline in business was purposefully engineered by a larger company, Kim Shin starts thinking about revenge.
Computer science major Chu Sang Woo falls in love with fellow student Jang Jae Young, and their relationship is explored in this four episode special series based on the Semantic Error graphic novel.
A jaded film critic reunites with an aspiring director after years apart due to a mysterious event. Their reunion triggers buried memories and emotions, leading them to confront their shared past.
Tae Joo has charm and good looks and dates rich women. He finds a strange poor girl in front of his apartment. He finds himself falling for her. It won't be smooth sailing though for this couple.
A successful OB-GYN with wealth, fame, and beauty finds emptiness in life. The story explores loneliness and love through his journey and the lives of regular people and their families.
When their humans are away, a cute and curios pup and his dog pals love to play with their best friends - their favorite toys!

primary_title: Di 29 Jie LG Bei Shi Jie Wei Qi Qi Wang Zhan

plot: FC Soldout, a failing soccer team, is bought by an agency aiming to profit by commoditizing it. They replace unattractive players with high face-value actors from their agency, forcing them into the team.

The beloved casts from the hit dating reality series (EXchange) Seasons 1-3 reunite for an exciting new chapter. This spin-off explores new love, unexpected connections, and deepening friendships. They share many heartfelt moments.
The journey of Jin-woo Sung, a weak hunter who gains mysterious powers and transforms into the strongest hunter.
Five brothers and a sister-in-law who suddenly became the head of the family after her husband's unexpected death.
Follows contestants living together in a castle competing for a cash prize while some secretly designated as "Traitors" attempt to eliminate the "Innocents" without being detected.
In his first year on the job, a rookie employee who is charming and hard-working, but who up until this point has been rather unlucky in love, begins to develop feelings for his boss.

primary_title: The Queen Who Crowns: Before Sunrise
plot: Prequel of the The Queen Who Crowns (2025). The fateful first meeting between Wongyeong, who had dreams of a new world before she had a child, and Bang-won, who had the same feelings.
Overcoming family and societal pressures, two men in their early thirties fall in love and build a life together.
Singles live together for 9 days, getting makeovers and dating guidance while seeking real connections. They experience emotional moments as they pursue romance through flirtations and dates.
Mi-kyung's potato-focused world changes when she meets the practical Baek-ho, sparking a spiraling romantic comedy about healing and growth.

Pepper, a teen gamer, meets Glee Heart, a princess from the emotion-powered world of Emotia. Together, they embark on the adventure of battling Phone Head, a corrupted human spreading addictive content.
Ae-Ra is broke and seeks revenge after learning that her ex-husband Jung-Woo, whose business struggled during their marriage, has now made a fortune.
Elite athletes from eight countries battle for national pride. After grueling tests of raw strength and endurance, only one flag can claim victory.
A gripping teen mystery thriller that centers on the intense bond between teenage girls as they navigate a brutal survival competition even more challenging than the entrance exam.
Establishing and running a new content production company by an entertainment producer and a once-popular actor.

primary_title: The Echoes of Survivors: Inside Korea's Tragedies
plot: Showcases the tales of those who survived Korea's darkest chapters, shining a light on hidden truths.

Seul Gi gets a new job at a chocolate company and works hard, but can't seem to adjust to its atmosphere. She tries to overcome her alienation with her positivity, but constantly gets hurt. One day at Honggeumdang, a place she visited to fix her broken watch, she falls in love with the charm of handmade chocolate. She soon becomes the only member of a task force for an in-house contest for Valentine's Day and collaborates with the owner of Honggeumdang to create the best chocolate ever. However, it isn't easy to find teammates. Just then, Hyun Nam, the chocolate maniac, and Jeremy, the extrovert social media influencer, appear. Will the unique trio and the strangely cool Mr. Hong be able to create the ultimate chocolate that will charm everyone on Valentine's Day?
Welcome to the prestigious international high school, Knowing Foreign Language High School, with students from the US, Japan, and South Africa. Caution, there are Koreans too.

A merger and acquisitions specialist, Yoon Joo-No, is a legendary negotiator. His team of experts including Lawyer Oh Soon-Young and Choi Jin-Soo specialize in large corporation deals between companies.

Set against the backdrop of the gritty and intense 1960s and 80s Korean entertainment industry, 'Show Business' follows the journey of individuals who, despite having little, dreamed of glimmering success and gave it their all.

Minwoo Han is a 28-year-old webtoon writer, quiet but talented, his works quickly catching the attention of publishers and readers alike. But when he begins to draw a new story, the inspiration from which he doesn't wholly realize draws from his own past, he develops a writers block that turns out to be much more. As Minwoo tries to complete the work titled December 8, the mounting pressure from his publisher as well as fans of his story begins to take a toll on his health. Amongst frequent nightmares and even hallucinations, he suffers severe headaches which he comes to attribute to missing memories. Determined to find out what could have caused such a thing in the first place, the already introverted Minwoo distances himself from those around him as he retraces his past and delves deeper into the mysteries of his 18-year old self, the traces of his forgotten first-love, and his connection to the girl from his hallucinations, Mimi.

Three shots are fired and the president of South Korea suddenly goes missing from his vacation villa. Three Days is a condensed-time thriller that follows the struggles of elite Blue House bodyguard Han Tae Kyung (Park Yoo Chun) to find and protect the president. With the aid of local police officer Yoon Bo Won (Park Ha Sun) and fellow Blue House guards, will Han Tae Kyung be able to save the president before it's too late?

Kim Soo Hyun is a mother whose young daughter gets kidnapped and murdered. Due to a mysterious event where time was turned back exactly 14 days before the murder, Soo Hyun is given a second chance to save her daughter.

Despite coming from a criminal family, Jung Se Ro (Yoon Kye Sang) is a hardworking student who wants an honest life for himself. That is, until he accidentally gets entangled in one of his father's heists the night of a glamorous jewel exhibition opening. When the dust settles, Se Ro's father is dead and he is falsely accused of killing a man. After being released from prison five years later, Se Ro takes up the life of a con man, joining a ring of jewel smugglers led by Park Kang Jae (Jo Jin Woong). Se Ro is filled with revenge for his father's death and his wasted life until he meets the beautiful jewel heiress, Han Young Won (Han Ji Hye), who has developed a cold heart after the death of her fiancé. The couple brings each other back to life in an ill-fated love, not knowing that Young Won's fiancé was actually the man killed by Se Ro five years earlier.

Tao is the seven-year-old adventure-loving protagonist of the series. He is the descendant of a powerful ancient wizard. Before receiving his invitation to attend the magic school, Tao lived with his grandfather. At school, Tao aims to become a great wizard. Tao has a magical paintbrush which turns everything he draws into real objects. Tao also has a soft spot for Jasmine.
A burned-out webtoon artist discovers a unique virtual dating subscription service that lets her meet her ideal matches, blurring the lines between her demanding reality and digital romance.
Follows a genius actuary and his team as they bond while tackling divorce complexities to develop a new divorce insurance policy.

Kwon Ji-yong (G-Dragon) gathers talented idols, actors, comedians, and more to join together in creating music that moves across generations. 'Good Day' brings many laughs and with it some inspiration and heartfelt moments. It's truly created an atmosphere that leaves you wanting more. While working on this project, donations were made that will be going to a very worth cause.

The only hope for new millennium is love and people. Man-ho couldn't forget his first love and his three sons weren't close to each other. The eldest son, Joon-tae is under pressure with his position in family and has to face high expectation from his parents. He also had a broken heart for his first love but he tried his best to take care of his wife and family. The second son, Hyun-tae was very amrt but he couldn't go to college as he was poor. And the money he saved for college had been taken for Myung-tae's bail money. But Hyun-tae keeps studying for a state law examination whim he works as a patrol. The third son, Myung-tae is a trouble maker and couldn't get along with Hyun-tae. He hated his father for treating his mother bad. Myung-tae likes tearoom hostess Sang-ran.
Eric Sebastian Taylor shows kids around the world of fun and easy to learn English.

Sixth Sense: City Tour is back. Armed with sharper instincts, the cast explores the hottest city spots, uncovering hidden fakes along the way. From viral hotspots to trendy must-sees, can they spot what's real in this travel guessing game?

A 34-year-old woman named Lee So-young looks 10 years younger than her real age and manages to fool almost everyone around her. With a large family debt to take care of, only a high school degree, and big dreams of becoming a fashion designer, So-young has her work cut out for her. The only thing she has going for her in the cutthroat fashion world is her youthful appearance. In a fortunate accident, she gets mistaken for her younger sister, Lee So-Jin, for a modeling job and manages to land a position at her dream fashion company. There, she meets one of the managing directors, Choi Jin-wook, who looks far older than he really is. The two of them clash, especially since Jin-wook treats So-young with disrespect.

4-Part documentary series where Lee Min Ho films over a 700-day period in the DMZ to capture nature and animals. Untouched by humans for over half a century, DMZ's nature would be close to how this land would look when the civilization disappears. Nature and wilderness breathe here freely, and endangered species have made the place their habitat. With the narration of actor Lee Min-ho, the documentary reveals the beauty of Korea's nature in its rawest and purest form. Here, there is a silent land where humans stepped down. It is a military demarcation line between North and South. It is the foremost front that consumed two-thirds of the 37-month Korean War, and the DMZ, a military operation area that has not been available for more than 60 years since the armistice. It is the largest temperate primeval forest on Earth, where human history of heartbreak and the wild survival of wild animals coexist.
A romance drama centered on the shocking and imprudent triangle love story between Bangja a servant, Chun Hyang concubine daughter and Lee Mong Ryong a scholarship.

Smart and resourceful Da On has worked hard to overcome hardships and live a comfortable life. Yet an ambiguous relationship with a new colleague and the appearance of two former love interests could throw his stable life into chaos.
He can tell if they're future killers or future victims. What's a regular kid supposed to do with this kind of power?

U Hyeon has a secret crush on his handsome young teacher, so when Do Ha, his best friend, finds out he makes an unexpected proposition - to date each other till graduation. Will U Hyeon accept? And what exactly are Do Ha's true intentions?

The life of a three-generation mother and daughter in Daechi-dong, where Jeong-eun (Jeon Hye-jin), a working mother, prepares for her daughter's '7th birthday' and entrusts Ji-ah (Jo Min-soo) with driving her to school.
A cop must work with his mother, the "Mantis" - a female serial killer who murdered 5 men decades ago - when copycat killings emerge. He's hated her his whole life.

Han So Min, an unknown actress, who endures with only determination. She loses her parents to a phishing scam one day and infiltrates a massive voice phishing organization using deepfake technology, and takes them all down.

When a South Korean construction giant wins an international construction bid to bring water from the desert to Tripoli, Libya its mission was to create a Green Tripoli but was much easier said than done.
A young woman with the ability to see mysterious red connections between lovers discovers her secret gift is no longer unique when special glasses granting similar powers appear on the black market.

Mrs. Go's sheltered, idyllic existence as a housewife in a beautiful home by the sea is destroyed when her husband is disgraced and killed. She must learn to make her own way in the world when she faces losing everything.
Just before the Korean War in a small northern town the daughter of the water dealer and the foreign priest fight hard to keep religious freedom alive.
A jet plane named Jett travels the world delivering packages to children and solving problems with his friends the Super Wings.

Follows five friends in high school who receive a death warning from a mysterious wish-granting app. As they struggle to escape their fates, they uncover chilling truths that connect the app to the sudden death of a classmate.
The sports academy romance between Sunwoo who can't wait to leave the judo club, and Taehyung who must keep him from leaving.

Music can show the pulse of any society but when the politics starts to run out of control, the pulse of any nation needs to be checked again and again. Conductor Smith gives the beat but the Heroin gives the pulse of that beat.

original_title: The Boy in the Last Row
plot: A Korean lit professor and one-time novelist stopped writing after harsh criticism in his youth. Now teaching at a top university, he's frustrated with students' poor writing while living with his own failure.

Two competitive families, two matriarchal wife's, O Na Ra and her frienemy sister O Yu Jin, two dumb husbands who their wife's don't hear what they say, children who don't hear what they parents say. A day to day caos sitcom comedy.

Mild-mannered Tae Jung is wrongfully imprisoned for a heinous crime. He soon discovers that a mysterious figure named Yo Han orchestrated his downfall. Fueled by vengeance, Tae Jung sets out to make Yo Han pay.
Eight young fortune tellers stay together for a week to predict their own romantic futures, using their unique abilities to blindly search for their destined love.

A Joseon-era man leaps 400 years to 2024 Seoul, working at a restaurant with those who saved him. As chef, he seeks both culinary excellence and his would-be killer while pursuing his dream of equality.
A cunning noblewoman and a notorious playboy engage in a secret game of seduction and manipulation, drawing an innocent young widow into their dangerous romantic power play.
Three orphaned brothers, separated in childhood, unbeknownst to each other, pursue entirely different paths in adulthood: detective, thief and adopted heir to a high-rolling developer.
A self-proclaimed dating expert teams up with the class president to prevent his secret crush from dating a popular student-singer, unaware that his new ally harbors feelings for him instead.

Min Jun's mundane office life is disrupted when his ex-boyfriend, Jin Hwan, joins his workplace after 8 years. As Jin Hwan charms their coworkers, Min Jun struggles with their past and Jin Hwan's attempts to reconnect.

A detective's son becomes a cop to catch Gap Dong, a killer whose case went cold. When his father died as a suspect, he refused to believe Gap Dong was dead. As new evidence emerges, both he and the original detective pursue the truth.
The turbulent and eventful growth period of three friends - one rich, one poor and one aspiring to be rich - and their families.
A man who dreamed of becoming a national judo representative, Jun-woo, is defeated in a single match by Min-jae, who appeared like a comet.
"If I tell you I like you, will you believe me?" An anthology of four love stories featuring eight men. Each story has its own unique outcome.
Faves' Faves is a variety web series starring Soobin with the premise of different guests talking about their own journeys of being a fan.
Aliens run a brutal singing contest for abducted humans in their post-apocalyptic world. Season 50 promises the same drama and thrills. Contestants must perform well or face elimination.
When a man in his 30s, Byeon Hyeok Jun, trying to escape the quagmire of debt and starts a super high-value but secretive part-time job leading to an unfolding of unexpected events.

Pan Da Yang is as sweet and lovable as her name suggests, and she owns a small bakery called Panda Café. She hires a new pastry chef, Ko Seung Ji, whose name sounds like "hedgehog" and has a prickly personality to match. As the clashing duo churn out sweet desserts, they try to compete against a national franchise Cake Company that happens to be owned by Panda's first love. Whose desserts will reign supreme?

After passing at 80, Lee Hae-sook enters Heaven keeping her elderly appearance, while her husband Ko Nak-joon appears as his 30-year-old self. As Heaven's postman, he delivers Earth's wishes as they begin their afterlife together.
Bunny, a top sculpture student, struggles with self-esteem after a failed relationship. Her life changes when she meets Hwang Jae Yul, a warm design student, and Cha Ji Won, a perfect chaebol heir.

primary_title: I'd Rather Quit Than Die, Director!
plot: Seo Jin Woo, who died in an accident after being sidelined at work, suddenly wakes up in the past?! He's returned to the time before his idea was stolen and decides to quit, but when Executive Director Baek Eui Hyeon says just one thing, he ends up becoming the project lead instead!

Kim Yeong-ran (Jeon Yeo-been), a female bodyguard from humble beginnings, who entered into a contract marriage with a terminally ill conglomerate chairman of Gaseong Group. She must change her own identity and survive for 3 months.
Members of girl group tripleS compete to earn the most badges.
Young singles travel to Italy to live in the same house for one month, relying only on a compatibility questionnaire to choose a partner - all in pursuit of love, marriage, and a shared future.
Show Champion is a South Korean music television program broadcast live by MBC M every Wednesday at Bitmaru Broadcasting Center in Ilsan.
Players take roles of detectives and suspects in this crime-solving game. With clues and wits, can they expose the culprit among them?
It covers the stories of insiders who closely weave together events and people from the 1980s and 1990s. Lee Gang Hui is a figure who organizes and controls the board that moves South Korea.

Aiming to get over his long-time crush on childhood friend Ji Hun, Ba Woo resorts to a 'confession attack', proposing they date for a week with intentions to scare him away. However, Ji Hun's response may thwart Ba Woo's plan completely.
When a K-pop star's band kicks him out, he enrolls in college and falls for a music student, who might be the key to his next musical venture.
A jealous, envious man seeks inner peace while feeling isolated in a world where others seem to succeed.
A food company heir running Seoul's top restaurant meets a passionate rural chef. Despite his indifference to taste, they develop feelings while operating a small eatery together in Jeonju.
Actor Park Bo-gum presents beautiful and splendid moments as he and his guests offer comfort and solace through music.
Identical twin sisters with opposite lives - one a former athlete living freely, the other a corporate perfectionist switch places with each other, despite their contrasting personalities.

People in their twenties navigate career challenges, romantic relationships, and self-discovery as they transition from adolescence to adulthood, experiencing emotional turmoil and pursuing love and ambitions amidst growing maturity.
Jason and his students, Andrew, Chloe, Noah and Vicki, learn English through adventures inside the classroom and beyond.
Twice faces fun challenges, escape rooms, zombie survival, cooking battles, and outdoor quests showcasing their teamwork, humor, and unpredictable chemistry.
Twice TV is a reality show that follows the members of Twice. The episodes show the course of their days in recordings, games, photo shoots etc.
A film director in a slump falls in love with a terminally ill actress, who finally tries to live as the main character at the end of her own life.

Se-hyun, a genius forensic scientist who discovers traces of her father's killings while doing an autopsy, and goes on a hunt in order to hide the past that she wants to erase, before the police get to the truth first.
Cha Woo-sol, a victim of school bullying for three years, is released from prison and becomes a criminal and a world mixed martial arts champion.

In this thrilling melodrama, the Golden Cross is a group of the top 0.001% richest and most powerful Koreans who control politics and the economy through conspiracies and stratagems. When Kang Do Yun (Kim Kang Woo) gets involved with one of their schemes, his sister ends up losing her life at the hands of one of its leaders. After his father is framed for the murders, Kang Do Yun vows to bring the corrupt group down, becoming a prosecutor seeking revenge. His plan gets complicated, however, when he falls for the daughter (Lee Si Young) of the very man responsible for the death of his family.
A woman in denial about her drinking problem encounters her former best friend from high school, now cold and unsympathetic. His changed attitude pushes her to investigate what altered him.

EMT Yoon Soo-wan, who had been blind, and successful surgeon Park Dong-joo were each other's first loves, but were forced to separate due to painful family circumstances. They cross paths twelve years later, but Soo-wan engaged to another.

CEO Kang Tae Pung runs Typhoon Company, his family business. His father cherished it like family. Since inheriting it after his father's death, he's fought to save it, especially during the 1997 IMF crisis.
A successful corporate designer with a privileged life yearns for simplicity until fate intervenes. Her path crosses with a grief-stricken surgeon seeking vengeance after a devastating loss.
A lonely lawyer falls for a murderer in this Japan-Korea drama. Mamono explores dark themes of desire, infidelity and domestic violence through visually striking scenes of people's twisted lives.

After narrowly surviving a serious accident, labor lawyer Noh Moo Jin gains an unexpected gift: he can now see ghosts. To stay alive, he must take on and resolve the unfinished cases of these restless souls.

P4: are the new recruits in the violent crimes unit at Gangnam Police Station. The journey of four young cops as they fumble, learn, fall in love and find their way to becoming people the citizens can trust.
Park Hoon and his father were kidnapped by North Korea and he fell in love with Jae Hee, but lost contact.

Jae-young is a woman in her 30's, recently coming out of a long term relationship, working on a job that doesn't really fulfill her. Looking for what she really wants in life, she starts with the basics, food.

A former boxing champion turned gang member seeks redemption as a small-town boxing coach, while becoming entangled with an amnesiac prosecutor and a complex web of lies surrounding their shared past.
A reclusive novelist forming an unlikely alliance with a loan shark who once chased him down to hunt the mysterious "Rat" who's stolen everything from him.

"Street Food Bikers" is a program where people who are serious about Korean food and recipes cook on food bikes kitchen and travel around Spain in the Mediterranean Sea. Ryu Soo-young, the "Teacher Eo Nam Seon," who has accumulated 100 million views on recipes, Michelin chef Fabri for 15 consecutive years, and Hwang Kwang-hee, Shin Hyun-ji, Bae In-hyuk and Jeon So-mi travel around Cadiz in southern Spain to spread the taste of Korea.

Kkachi is a young boy who lost his mother at the age of 6 and lives with his father who has the habit of crossing Korea with his caravan but they suddenly move to Seoul where he joins baseball team at his college and his father marries a new wife. His father wants to force him to forget about losing his mother and has to learn to live with her father's new wife and daughter of her, Annie, a young handicapped girl who moves in a wheelchair. It took him a while to finally accept his stepmother and his new sister. During this period, he is fully participating in baseball quickly becoming the star player on his team and got to know Julie, with whom he gets along.

MIB, a streaming platform exclusive to South Korea, is launching a new K-MIB site to reach out global audience. K-MIB is a dedicated platform exclusively created for users living outside of South Korea.

Maeng Gong is the coach of the professional basketball team 'Big Pandas', which has been on the verge of elimination from the playoffs for three consecutive years. Due to poor performance, he is in danger of being fired. When he was young, he was a star player who attacked boldly on the court, as his name suggests, but now he is more famous as the 'Young Gong Dae' coaching a professional basketball team. Ko Hwa Jin, a dedicated hater of Maeng Gong, works under the nickname 'Maeng Gong Extermination Group'. He is a high school student who knows how to analyze the game in seconds. He is a character who has become a malicious commenter, full of hostility and a desire to get revenge on Maeng Gong. With his job on the line, Maeng Gong decides to work with his malicious commenter to achieve team results.

The search for the next big boy group is on! Over 100 contestants from around the world are following their dreams, hoping to become a star. Aspiring newcomers and idols looking for a second chance alike come together to see if they can make the final cut. Half the show will feature Korean music, while the other half will focus on Chinese, with the winning contestants from both sides coming together in one group. A team of mentors consisting of talented music artists, dancers, and choreographers will help guide these idol hopefuls as they compete for one of eight spots, selected by the audience. This program is the successor to 2021's "GIRLS PLANET 999" and 2023's "BOYS PLANET."
A variety music show that finds a 1% difference in the thrilling synchronization between AI singers and real singers.
In this quirky eatery, guests place open-ended orders that chefs interpret into custom dishes - a delectable talk show where every story inspires a meal.

primary_title: League of Universities: The Athlete Boys
plot: A clash of students with great physiques representing each university - a new physical competition show produced by production team. Youth, passion, spirit, and freshness that have never been seen in conventional physical survival program
The Chris family, absolute rulers of a hotel empire and overlords of the shadowy underworld, have lost their youngest daughter. However, she was actually switched at birth 25 years ago.
I am not inheriting you the company unless you get yourself married first. Father's words. In order to inherit the company, Evelyn has to get herself a husband as soon as possible.

At a masquerade ball, a billionaire meets two women - one scheming, one innocent. While deception brings them together, true feelings emerge, complicating a marriage promise and testing where his heart truly belongs.
A shy ex-Olympic gymnast finds university life harder than winning medals until he meets a popular basketball player with a hidden gentle side. Their differences challenge their growing attraction.

Cassie lost everything after her father's passing. Her evil stepmother forces a marriage with Felix, a ruthless Billionaire. Cassie can't stand the suffocating pain of living with this heartless monster. But everything changes.

Kim Ji-Hyeok (Kang Ji-Hwan) doesn't have parents and goes through a tough life. He then meets Dal-Sook who runs a small restaurant at a traditional market. Kim Ji-Hyeok follows her like his mother and settles down at the traditional market. He works hard to open up his own store within the traditional market. Suddenly, Kim Ji-Hyeok becomes a hidden son from a family that owns Korea's top company Hyunsung. He realizes though that there are impure intentions. Since that moment, Kim Ji-Hyeok takes revenge upon the people at the Hyunsung company. He becomes romantically involved with a woman named So Mi-Ra (Lee Da-Hee) who he meets at the most important time in his life.
An infamous lawyer who loses his memory in an accident but not his skills and talent in deductive reasoning.
Based on the popular Taiwanese drama, My Queen. Despite her witchy reputation at work, 39-year-old tabloid reporter Ban Ji Yeon (Uhm Jung Hwa) is ultra focused on her job.
A woman from a small town discovers smuggled gold bars and must flee dangerous criminals, forcing her to head back to the place she swore to avoid.
Yu Ha needs independence from family. Min U wants to avoid marriage pressure. Their fake dating arrangement leads to unexpected real feelings developing between them.

Five attorneys at a law firm navigate cases and build friendships. They include An Ju Hyeong, a competent but detached senior lawyer, and Kang Hui Ji, a passionate junior associate who believes in changing lives.
A woman accused of killing her husband is offered a deal by a mysterious stranger - but to prove her innocence, she must commit murder.

Confidence Queen tells the story of Yi-rang, a smart woman who becomes the ultimate con artist. She teams up with James and Gu-ho, working as a trio of swindlers, to expose scammers and take their ill-gotten gains.

primary_title: Julian Kim & Tae Yang Jeong's Opera Opera
plot: Baritone Julian Kim and pianist Tae Yang Jeong host a vibrant opera series, performing arias, introducing productions, and welcoming guest singers to bring the world of opera to life for both seasoned fans and new audiences.
A young woman named Choi Kang-soon is betrothed to an wealthy and powerful man, but she falls in love with another man and must choose between him and her duty.

primary_title: The First Night with the Duke
plot: College student K enters her favorite historical romance novel as noble's daughter Cha Seon Chaek. After one night with royal-blooded Lee Beon, she tries to pair him with the novel's heroine, but fate has other plans.
Four neglected housewives escape their mundane routines by becoming amateur sleuths, solving local mysteries while rediscovering their self-worth and aspirations.

Julian Jootaek Kim's Opera Odyssey is a 12-part educational series produced by EBS Class-e in South Korea. Hosted by baritone Julian Kim, the program explores the history and structure of opera, including the role of heroes, vocal types, bel canto technique, and the dramatic power of arias. It also examines opera's cultural significance and the challenges it faces in modern society.
A young woman raised by a foster mom reunites with her wealthy birth family after 20 years, stirring tensions as they overcome loss through understanding and forgiveness.
Five siblings face endless missions in this pure entertainment variety show. With a few screws loose, they embrace chaos in their search for sanity.

primary_title: The Woman Who Swallowed the Sun
plot: Single mom Baek Seol Hui runs a restaurant and lives happily with her daughter until a case turns her daughter from victim to perpetrator. She seeks revenge against those responsible.

A love story between an heiress who tries to save her father's legacy, the one and only seven-star hotel in the nation and the hotel manager who becomes an enemy to his own father who abandoned him in order to help the heiress.

Former child star Sunwoo Hae lives quietly as a novelist after a troubled past. His first love Je Yeon, now a driven entertainment executive, returns after 10 years. Their reunion stirs memories and changes both their lives.
Popular girl Kang Min Ju is attending the same university as Yun Jae and has a crush on him.

primary_title: Ed and Ryu: Mad About Seafood
plot: A Korean-American chef and a South Korean actor travel the coast of South Korea, discovering ancient methods of fishing and marine harvesting while exploring the rich culinary tradition of the sea in different seasons of the year.
Park Seok Cheol, a gangster family's grandson with a pure heart, falls for aspiring singer Kang Mi Yeong. He navigates life's challenges while protecting his family, career, and love.

Diana and Leo broke up after 8 years of being together. Diana was actually pregnant with Leo's child but kept it a secret, knowing it'll be burden to him. After years of training, Leo became a successful star chef and starts his career.

Woo So Jeong is a doctor. Even though it is illegal, she helps terminally ill patients, who are suffering from pain, with euthanasia. She does this with Dr. Choi Dae Hyeon. Detective Cho Hyeon U works to track them down.

Wi Jeong-sin, a respected political journalist is forced to cover entertainment. There, she meets Lim Hyeon-jun, a fading actor. Amid chaotic backstage, new beginnings, and surprises, an unlikely, fun, and chemistry-filled romance blossoms
Twelve angels live as humans protecting Korea from evil spirits. After sealing dark forces in hell through sacrifice, they brought peace. Now, as evil awakens, chaos returns. Based on zodiac animals.

Seo Myung-joon is a South Korean scientist who falls in love with North Korean scientist Im Jin-jae while developing an alternative energy source together. But when Myung-joon unexpectedly becomes the president of a reunified Korea, political tensions rise as a massive struggle for limited natural resources continues to divide the country.

Leaders from Korea's 707 Special Task Force, British SAS, Sweden's SOG, and US green beret will pick members from Korea's elite special forces to make a team to represent South Korea in a national competition.

primary_title: A Great Adventure in Korean History

plot: A disgraced former rugby star returns as a coach to his high school's struggling team, where he reunites with his ex-girlfriend and helps the determined captain lead the team to redemption.

A 43-year-old single mom and her 23-year-old, medical student daughter starting a new chapter in their lives by heading off to the countryside, encountering people along the way who teach them meaningful lessons about life.

primary_title: Shinbi's Haunted House Special: The Ghost Hunter Princess

plot: Jin U, who came to boarding school, has one goal: to get into a Korean university. But Eun Hyeok, who is completely uncontrollable, keeps crossing the line.
French chef Yeon Ji Yeong wins a top competition but mysteriously lands in Joseon Dynasty, where she must cook fusion royal cuisine for a tyrannical king with an extremely sensitive palate.
The drama captures beautiful sceneries of various travel destinations and provides heartwarming stories and healing for viewers.
Jisu's ex-boyfriend, Heejun, and child actor, Juyeon, are double-cast as Romeo, entangling Juliet Jisu in a love triangle.
Rookie idol group, Deep Blue, faces a crisis amid leader Jungwoo and Junhee's secret romance and conflicts with Alex.

Pitcher Taehun and catcher Jeongho, from a struggling high school baseball team on the brink of disbandment, lead their team in their own ways. As they get to know each other's true feelings, they gradually achieve perfect teamwork.
Having lived his entire life as a piano prodigy, Dong Uk finds himself envying Seong Hun's superior talent - but at the same time, he falls in love with him.
Unfolds the diverse desires of Se Eun, the entertainment representative who planned Korea's top idol group, Seung Hui, the die-hard fan who follows them, and the people surrounding them.
A story of conflict, growth, and love begins when Yeonwoo, still holding on to past feelings for his senior, Woojin, finds out that Woojin is now engaged to his sister.
A man whose artificial heart is running out of battery and a woman who has the power to recharge him.

A realistic romance drama that depicts the comeback of top star Im Se Ra, who had a career gap of 25 years after receiving the youngest Best Actress Award and getting into an accident on the day she was at the peak of her career.
A young, rookie lawyer with a strong sense of justice joins a top law firm - navigating the complex legal world under a cold, demanding mentor.
A look into the private lives of the Jung sisters, SNSD's Jessica and Fx's Krystal.

Despite his charm and success, Lee Ji Hyeok pursues hobbies over marriage. After he rejects Eun Oh's confession, they stay friends. His best friend Seong Jae secretly loves Eun Oh, and when these feelings surface, their lives transform.

Couple influencers, Eunseong and Jiyeon, only dated for 3 months, but thanks to the social media algorithm, their popularity skyrocketed. Now broken up, they've been pretending to be a couple for 6 months. Just when everything seemed stable, Gangwoo enters the picture, leaving Eunseong torn between his influencer life and true love.

Yuho, who comes from the city, feels an inexplicable and intense attraction to Jingu, whom he meets in the countryside. And in the midst of excitement and confusion, their relationship dangerously intertwines.
A woman dons a mask to flee her situation and rise to power, causing devastation along her path.

It depicts the story of an ordinary housewife, Kang Eun Su, who turns to crime by selling drugs worth hundreds of billions of won that she accidentally finds while struggling to pay for her terminally ill husband's medical expenses.
Top Korean celebrities play matchmaker for friends who are great catches but unlucky in love-or just haven't met the right one yet. Will they open up and fall in love?
High school student 'Jeong-woo,' who possesses the ability to detect misfortune, as he becomes a terrorist himself to save people and confront a massive conspiracy.

Can a high school boy lead a double life? Lee Min Seok (Seo In Guk) is a rising hockey player at his high school leading an average high school life, complete with a groupie classmate, Jung Yoo Ah (Lee Yeol Eum), who has a crush on him.
A flustered teacher scrambles to hide his fanboy side when his idol films at school-but being cast as his co-mentor makes secrets hard to keep.

primary_title: Idol Festa Daejakjeon: Jeonguk Banjjak Tueo
plot: Top K-pop groups visit cities around the country to provide local residents with local specialties and performances.
Love and relationships that could turn anyone into a loser. People's inherent pathetic sides and the diverse thrilling moments that come with various forms of love.
Six different love stories about the innocence of teen love. Every love story is unique and powerful.

Twin brothers Do Ha and Do Yeong split up after parents' divorce. Do Ha lives in US, visits Korea summers to see neighbor Ha Kyung, who secretly likes him. His return stirs up hidden feelings and secrets from the past.
The series dramatizes the life of Kim Goo. one of Korea's most influential independence activists and political leader
The show brings in hosts Lee Su Geun, Eun Ji Won and Kim Jong Min to answer live questions from viewers through social networks and text messages.
This drama is about Kwangjong, the fourth king of the Koryo Dynasty which lasted from 918 to 1392.

Seon U comes from a poor family background. She was once a promising Taekwondo athlete, but she now works part-time jobs to support herself. One day, she is selected to become the stand-in for Ji Yeon due to their similar appearance. Ji Yeon is the granddaughter of Beomhan Construction Company's chairman. She was the driver of a fatal hit-and-run car accident. Seon U must play Ji Yeon in front of the public and media. Meanwhile, Seon U becomes the target of Ho Jung's hostility. Ho Jung is Ji Yeon's stepbrother, and he has an inferiority complex over Ji Yeon. He wants to become the successor to Beomhan Construction Company.

A bride-to-be wins a newlywed house, but after breaking up with her fiance and faced with debt, she finds a fake husband to move in with. They have to fool the house inspector for 90 days, then the dream home is officially hers.
T1 The Locker Room series presents a fly-on-the-wall perspective of life on and around the world's biggest esports franchise, the T1 League of Legends team.

The Hoechun Gate is a 1986 South Korean historical drama that aired as part of the 500 Years of Joseon Dynasty series. This 50-episode series focuses on the political turmoil during the early 17th century.

Former lovers Lee Gyeong-do and Seo Ji-woo break up twice in their twenties, then reunite when Gyeong-do reports an affair scandal and Ji-woo is the wife in that scandal, leading to a bittersweet romance.
The story follows two young men, Kang Ki-hoon and his roommate Park Chan-young , both cadets in the Air Force Academy with dreams of becoming pilots and soaring across the open sky

Woo nara, a university student who is hiding her identity, that she is from North Korea, Do Jin-Woo, a South Korea's top star who also has a mysterious secret. Will they be able to settle in the South?

primary_title: The Moon Flows Through the River
plot: It tells the story of the soul exchange between a prince who has lost his smile and a saddle-carrying merchant who has lost her memory.

The 1st republic follows Korea's turbulent path from liberation in 1945 through Syngham Rhee's presidency, the Korean War, political corruption and rising unrest, ending with the 1960 April revolution and the fall of the first republic/
Just two months before the president-elect is sworn in, he demands a divorce from his wife - but she dreamed of becoming the first lady.

Based on Jang Ryu-Jin's best-selling novel, the series follows three women exhausted by monotonous jobs and mediocre salaries. They pin their hopes on criptomoeda, dreaming of prices skyrocketing - all the way to the moon.

Every summer, Se Woon, a freshman in the business administration department who always wanted to run away, ends up getting deeply entangled with Chae Min, a senior he dislikes and the captain of the basketball club, during a summer session class.

Two detectives pursue a killer leaving mutilated bodies and cryptic messages across Japan and Korea. Korean text appears with Tokyo victims, Japanese with Korean victims, leading to an international manhunt.

primary_title: The Ume Tree in the Midst of the Snow
plot: The third episode of 500 Years of Joseon Dynasty deals with the period of history spanning from the reign of King Munjong, the first son of Sejong, to the chaos of Yeonsangun's rule.

primary_title: Quiet Please! - Jebal Joyonghi Jom Hae!

plot: Based in the time of enlightenment of 19th-century Joseon, This drama tells the story of Joseon's last swordsman named Park Yoon Kang who grabs a gun ditching his sword and grows to become the era's hero. Park Yoon Kang is the son of the best swordsman in Joseon. After his father and sister get killed, he trades sword for gun as he embarks on his revenge mission.
Jjaemin9 grounded video and simple sandbox2 season 1 been 2021 restore by game on countryball office mapping
A Korean Talk show where multiple guests are invited to talk about life experiences.
A woman returns to Korea, tricked by her father seeking an heir. A delivery man with debt meets her. They team up - she'll present him as elite marriage material to appease her father.
A single woman who disguises herself as a married mom to get a job, and the team leader of a baby products company who falls in love with her.

primary_title: Carrie and Super Kola the School

plot: Two best friends and their crew embark on a completely unscripted road trip to Texas, where anything can happen.
Korean entertainers Lee Soo Geun, Eun Ji Won, and Kyu Hyun embark on an unpredictable journey through Kenya, sharing laughs and genuine friendship while exploring Africa's breathtaking landscapes.

The drama recounts the life of steel magnate, Park Tae-Joon, who became the founder and chairman of POSCO, a then-fledgling South Korean steel company that grew into a multinational steel-making conglomerate. The story revolves around Park's tireless effort to build a steel mill amongst the devastation in the aftermath of the Korean War. Rising up from the ashes amidst poverty and despair, this is the story of the Korean people's resolve and a relentless drive towards modernization.
A weekly talk show hosted by Yoo Hee Yeol with a celebrity guest from a variety of backgrounds.

primary_title: KBS 2 Mini Series - Selina Korean Experience 1997

plot: Top actress Momo, set to marry neurosurgeon Ju Shin, falls into a coma after an accident. Desperate, Ju Shin performs a forbidden soul-transfer surgery. She awakens with another consciousness in her body, unleashing tragic consequences.

One wrong number can change everything. Yoo I Seop is a quiet, reserved young man whose world shifts when he receives a call from an unknown number-one that wasn't meant for him. On the other end is Han U Tae, a bold and mysterious stranger whose voice becomes the beginning of something neither of them expected. What starts as an accidental connection grows into something deeper as they continue to talk, night after night. But both carry emotional scars, and neither of them has been entirely honest about who they are-or what they're hiding. When past traumas resurface and feelings grow complicated, they must confront their own fears before the line between comfort and pain disappears. Can a mistake lead to something real? Or are they destined to be two strangers, forever just a voice on the other end? Sometimes, the wrong number is the right person.

"One day, an ancient civilization came to me." In the rugged jungle, the enigmatic "Maya Civilization" bloomed brightly, only to vanish overnight. Now, three men set out to explore its mysteries. Cha Seung-won, upgraded to a civilization enthusiast, Dr. Cha, leads the way. Together, they form "Mayaz" and embark on an expedition to Mexico's ancient wonder - Maya. To unlock its secrets, they must immerse themselves in the civilization, tasting local cuisine, solving rituals at genuine Maya homes, and delving into the mysteries of this ancient culture. She transfers to Segi Art High School, a South Korean school that has produced some of the Korean entertainment industry's brightest stars. Her first few days are a success, and she soon strikes up a friendship with the handsome and popular aspiring singer Koo Eun Ho. But she soon discovers that egos at the school are fragile, and that her own success may be stoking resentment in others. Worse still, someone at the school has learned that she is harboring a secret - and threatens to make it public. Is disaster in the cards for her, or will her new friends help her fulfill her dreams at this highly competitive school?
The story of Ha Min-soo, a socialized werewolf freshman, conflicted between her love for her senior Kwon Hae-jun and the risk of her identity being exposed.

A romance anthology containing 10 different love stories. It explores romance, breakups, unrequited love, familial love, and even the love of older adults, singles, and minorities, all in a flexible format unique to short films, broadening the emotional spectrum of love.

plot: Two families with conflicts in the past, work through reconciliation, healing together.
The story will integrate the Chinese, Japanese, and Korean perspectives of the war to create a single coherent whole.
Late 18th century, facing the countries which attempt to invade and overpower Joseon, the great general Yi Sun Shin, diplomat strategy Lee Deok Hyung and Ryu Sung Ryong are standing together.
A youth coming-of-age drama rich in human comedy that tells the story of three unknown comedians and a woman whose life has collapsed, who rise up again and pursue their dreams.
A hardworking manager's one-night stand with her CEO throws their lives into chaos when they find out she's pregnant.
An unexpected incident strikes just as Alt and Ian are dreaming of a happy first anniversary.
After the end of the drama, another special was made for Goblin's fans.

Gyu Hyeon and Ji Seok run the very popular Prince Barber Shop. A tug-of-war of love between them begins when the cute and lovely Eun Seok appears in front of two people gaining popularity for their good looks and outstanding skills.
Korea's best hair and makeup expert opens a Korean-style beauty shop in Manhattan, New York, and presents the true face of K-beauty in the local area.
Kang Tae Ju, a former neurosurgeon who now serves as a hospital director struggling to face a dangerous criminal in order to save his wife, who was kidnapped before their divorce.
A farmer with multiple jobs and an insomniac TV host's lives intertwine in amusing ways as their opposite schedules repeatedly bring them together.
Four celebrities who hate hiking trek through Korea's winter mountains, discovering unexpected charm as they test their endurance and teamwork.
Two actors practice a love scene, but it seems like their feelings may be evolving from more than just acting.

Myo Jin lost her parents in a mysterious accident when she was a child. For 15 years, she has endured, only thinking about revenge. The perfect opportunity presents itself, but..She is involved in a car accident and loses all her memories.

No Way Home is a South Korean variety show that follows Sunny and Hyoyeon of Girls' Generation on winter camping trips with invited guests, featuring relaxed conversations and simple camping activities in an outdoor setting.

Rap Cup is a Korean hip-hop survival competition where rappers battle in a World Cup style tournament. Through knockout rounds and judged performances, contestants compete for a cash prize and the title of champion.

COVID-19, which has terrorised humanity, has finally ended, and the WHO defines it as an end-demic. Jung Yu Hyeon, a professor of infectious diseases at a Korean university hospital, faces a patient showing symptoms of the new virus.
Seven aspiring music industry trainees compete in a reality audition program to determine who will become the newest member of a well-known South Korean K-pop idol group.
A chaotic romance about cohabitation unfolds when a couple who have been at odds since their first meeting suddenly find themselves raising their 20-month-old nephew, Woo-joo.
A look into the lives of the Girls' Generation sub group, TaeTiSeo.
Sang Hyeok is an eccentric college freshman repeating a year, known for his stubborn principles, , and unconventional views on life and love, while maintaining a deep friendship with Tae Hyeon.
Presents the lives, adventures and struggles of 9 South Korean soldiers during their missions during the Korean War.

Jiwon is the vice president at his school and has the uncanny ability to read other people's thoughts. However, when he encounters Siwoo, he discovers that Siwoo is the one person whose thoughts remain a mystery to him, sparking an intriguing and mysterious relationship.
A group of vehicular toys come alive to explore ways to build good character in their friendship.

Liam is just starting high school-awkward, tired, and trying to survive lunch like everyone else. The problem? He isn't just a kid. He's a Star Child, born from forces that once shook the universe itself, carrying power he doesn't fully understand and a legacy he never asked for.

At Charlotte F. Combz High School, Liam meets a small, chaotic group of friends who slowly become his anchor: a nonchalant fighter who treats destiny like a joke, a gentle girl whose presence alone brings him peace, and others who are all dealing with their own fears, secrets, and strange abilities.

But the stars are watching.

An ancient organization dedicated to erasing celestial bloodlines begins to move, convinced that Liam's existence alone could threaten reality. As friendships deepen and bonds form, lines blur between enemy and ally, destiny and choice, power and responsibility.

Between late-night rooftops, awkward cafeteria moments, emotional breakdowns, and clashes that ripple through the city, Liam must learn what it truly means to grow up. not into a weapon, not into a god, but into himself.

On one side, there's school....friendships, isolation, awkward silences, crushes, jealousy, and the quiet fear of not belonging. Liam isn't socially smooth. He overthinks, shuts down, and sometimes feels like everyone else got a guidebook he missed. His humor becomes a shield. His silliness becomes survival.

On the other side, there's the cosmic inheritance he can't escape.

His powers usually surface during stress, guilt, fear, and moments of emotional fracture. Growth is uneven. Strength comes with consequences. Some abilities awaken naturally; others resist him, as if waiting to see who he becomes first.

The story deliberately avoids treating power as a reward.

Liam's greatest social strength is his genuine warmth-he's funny without trying too hard, kind without expecting anything back, and emotionally open in a way that makes people feel seen. He listens deeply, remembers small details, and shows up when it matters, even if he doesn't always know what to say. His humor and silliness make others comfortable, especially those who feel out of place themselves. However, Liam struggles with overthinking and self-doubt; he often misreads social cues, assumes he's a burden, or pulls back when he feels he's said too much. He has a tendency to internalize conflict, blaming himself for tension that isn't his fault, which can make him withdraw or shut down emotionally. While he longs for connection, he fears rejection just enough to hesitate...making his social growth a slow, uneven process built on trust rather than confidence.

This series is an original animated project created by Thorn&Velvet Studios, an independent animation studio focused on emotionally driven storytelling with surreal, cosmic, and magical aesthetics.

Thorn&Velvet Studios was founded on the idea that intimate stories deserve epic scale-that quiet conversations, personal trauma, and small moments of care can coexist with universe-shaking events. Rather than chasing spectacle for its own sake, the studio prioritizes character-first narratives, hand-crafted visuals, and themes that resonate with younger generations growing up in a chaotic world.
A South Korean variety-documentary-reality type show focusing on the impending debut of a new K-Pop girl group known as Apink.
Su Jong faces having his building auctioned off. Hwal Seong suggests a fake kidnapping in the basement. But the plan spirals when the hoax turns real, leading to an extreme situation.
Fantasy romantic comedy in which a mysterious being that possesses humans and a human that attracts monsters face each other at the intersection of fate.
The adventures, escapades and mishaps of Pororo the little penguin and his many varied friends.

Jeong Yeon joins the research lab of Yu Geon, his former private tutor, as an intern. However, Yu Geon's attitude upon their reunion is cold. An experiment that studies emotions, and two people facing each other once again. Subtle waves begin to ripple between Jeong Yeon and Yu Geon.

original_title: Mun je jeok Tam jeong sa mu so

plot: A reporter and a law school dropout strike up a fateful friendship while coincidentally searching for the same stray cat. As they become better acquainted, family secrets begin to unfold.

primary_title: Deseu geim: Cheon man won eul georeora

A VR dating CEO who hates love meets a romance-clueless writer. As they clash between AI-driven passion and analog emotions, a sweet yet messy story of healing and unexpected connection unfolds.
A spirit-possessed survival show where 49 fate masters gather to test their destinies through various missions.
A global pastry competition where elite and rising pastry chefs face off in intense challenges, blending technique, creativity, and passion to claim the ultimate title.
A man and woman shaped by loss and time separate in youth, then reunite ten years later to find their once-shared bond still guides them through love, grief, and adulthood.
Eight male dance crews fighting for the position of Korea's best male dance crew to represent street dance in the country.
Mermaid princess Ha Ni falls for Shi Kyung and becomes human, moving into In Gyeo House, a residence for job seekers. To stay human permanently, she must make Shi Kyung love her in 100 days.

Arang, a high school student suffering from relentless bullying, decides to end her life in despair. However, at her final moment, she makes a sinister pact with a demon seeking a human host. Possessed and transformed, Hana returns to school not as a victim, but as a chilling, supernatural force. She begins to hunt down her tormentors one by one, forcing them to pay for their sins in brutal ways that defy human imagination. Amidst the blood-stained hallways and the suffocating 9:16 frame, the screams of the bullies echo as Hana's demonic retribution unfolds.

Life, like clothes, sometimes gets wrinkled and shriveled. Jae Min, a 30-year-old job seeker who lives with anxiety that clings to him like grime, and Ji Seok, a 34-year-old voluntary unemployed person who threw away his well-ironed shirt and chose to stop. A healing romance between two men that blends in with the noise of the washing machines running late at night at a coin laundromat.
Hallyu star Geon U gradually crumbles under the pressure of endless sasaeng fans and the entertainment industry, and one day he accidentally gets entangled with college student Jae Yeon.
Joo Hong Bin, CEO of a game company, has got everything. He is capable, rich and even good-looking.
A love story between a psychiatrist named Ji Hae Soo and an author who had schizophrenia named Jang Jae Yeol.

Arch-enemies Ha Neul and Sae Byeok are now lovers. After a 10-year memory gap, Ha Neul wakes to find his sworn foe by his side. Caught between feelings and lost time, a startling truth resurfaces. "Wait, weren't we supposed to break up?"
Two women return under false identities to expose the Adel family's buried crimes and secrets.
An investigative occult romance drama about a hotel heiress who can see ghosts and a passionate prosecutor who team up in a chaotic partnership.

Set in Yeonriri, a village nicknamed a "clean yet fierce(?) zone." The story follows the city-born family of Seong Tae Hun, who move down from Seoul to Yeonriri and struggle to return to the city. Through their experiences, the drama portrays both a chaotic family reboot and a healing journey. At the center of the village are Im Ju Hyeong, the longtime village head who is devoted to protecting Yeonriri, and Nam Hye Seon, the women's association president and an influential figure in the community. Tension arises when Tae Hun's company, "Mat Story," begins to shake up the village. Meanwhile, Tae Hun's son Seong Ji Cheon, who secretly drops out of medical school after realizing it is not his true path, moves to Yeonriri with his family and begins searching for his true self. There, he meets Im Bo Mi, a native of Yeonriri and the daughter of Im Ju Hyeong and Nam Hye Seon. As their relationship develops, the younger generation finds themselves navigating love and personal choices amid the larger conflict between the village residents and the incoming city family. The series brings together the stories of longtime villagers, a city family trying to adapt, and young people facing love and life decisions, blending humor and healing within the setting of Yeonriri.
U Gyo struggles with anorgasmia, and meets the therapist Hui Su. A touch-based therapy begins... and grows more intimate with each session.
After waking up as his 17-year-old self, a famous painter reunites with his first love and faces a rare chance to rewrite their story.
A program that combines stories and music
Rain makes his comeback in this drama as an entertainment-company president who lost his girlfriend in an accident and finds himself falling in love with her younger sister, an aspiring songwriter.

Kind Nam Da Jung gets selected to participate in 'Liar Game', a reality show that gives its contestants money they have to cheat each other out of. To succeed, she seeks help from Cha Woo Jin, a convicted swindler and living lie detector.

Three brothers become drawn to the pretty Yuri, a family friend. Yuri arrives from France to live with them for the summer while attending classes at their university, causing each brother to be attracted to her in a different way.

This drama offers an objective view of the strained love of a couple in their 30s, worn down by life. Like a snail endlessly moving toward a sea it has never seen, people, too, search for and long for true love from birth until death.
A showdown between gangster-like housewives, about protecting home values, who end up dumping a corpse in the Han River after an incident, to protect their view of the Han River.
Set in the mid-60s, Park Hyeong Seob is the son of a lower-class family who decides to participate in the June 3rd uprising and go on a hunger strike.
A sports coming-of-age drama depicting the brilliant friendship and growth of a high school pitcher struggling with the yips and a mysterious transfer student who becomes his devoted manager.
Follows North Korean spies posing as a middle-class family in 1990s South Korea, torn between their mission, identity, and family bonds as a counterintelligence agent closes in.
The first drama directed by Lee Eun Kyu, the later producer of the 1s Shop of Coffee Prince.
Korean celebrities get together together in a room. For some fun, loving, memorable moments.

Set in a lawless city during the redevelopment boom of the 1980s ahead of the Seoul Olympics, Story follows Paeng I, the sole survivor of a gold shop incident who is thrust into the criminal underworld after taking possession of the gold.

This is a fantasy romance drama about an angel who has no choice but to become a human after saving a male student in danger. The noisy and ridiculous relationship between a mortal angel and teenage high school students will be unfolded.

Han Yeo-reum and Nam Ha-jin are committed to each other. Before Ha-jin can propose, Yeo-reum's ex, Kang Tae-ha, reappears in her life. Yeo-reum and Tae-ha begin to work together and realize that they might want to rediscover old love.

On the night of a blue moon lunar eclipse that happens once in ten years, the portal between the vampire world, where drinking human blood is forbidden, and the human world opens. Lucifer, a vampire prince who desperately craves human blood, descends into the human world. Min U, a university student in his early twenties, moves to the city from the countryside. He works tirelessly, day and night, to save up for tuition while also studying hard. However, Min U contracts a rare disease that puts his life at risk whenever he bleeds. One day, Min U becomes a victim of a hit-and-run accident, bleeding and finding himself in a life-threatening situation. Lucifer, drawn by the scent of blood, attacks Min U. However, something strange happens: Lucifer collapses, and Min U miraculously survives, unharmed.
Follows the lives of a group of males whose ages are 9-years-old, 19-years-old, 29-years-old and 39-years-old.

Will follow Demon 3375, a powerful being who has lived for centuries without ever understanding love, and Deul Pan, a sharp, highly capable hotel room attendant whose everyday life is anything but easy.

Park Dal Hyan, wishing to become a soldier, becomes involved with the Crown Prince and his faithful warriors who called themselves the 'Three Musketeers' in a Joseon ruled by a weak king and in conflict with the Quing dynasty.

A divorced couple meet again as the manager of a wedding department of a hotel and as a groom. A murder case takes place. Sang-Hyo (Yoo In-Na) is the manager for the wedding department of a hotel. She is a perfectionist with a bright personality. once She divorced 7 years ago. She meets her ex-husband Hae-Young (Jin Lee-Han) as a client at the hotel. Sang-Hyo and Hae-Young were in love and married, but they divorced less than 100 days later. Hae-Young is a famous architect. Sung-Gyeom (Namgung Min) is the management director of the hotel and Sang-Hyo's boss. The murder case that brings about a crisis at the hotel is related with his personal history. He is in a love triangle with Sang-Hyo and Eun-Joo (Lee Young-Eun). Eun-Joo works as public relations manager for the hotel. She is ambitious with her work career.

primary_title: When Our Kids Fall in Love

plot: Follows Jung-seok, the flawless CEO of an outdoor camping brand, whose orderly life is shaken when his former military superior A-mi, a.k.a 'Viper', joins his company as a rookie employee. Once a timid soldier, Jung-seok has reinvented himself as a confident, self-made leader. But his composure is tested when A-mi, once a legendary Special Forces officer, struggles to find her footing in civilian life, and in his office. The reunion of these two, now as CEO and an entry-level employee, sets the stage for an unpredictable, high-stakes romantic tug-of-war.
Set during the king Yeong-jo's reign in Joseon dynasty, the drama follows the king's uneasy relationship with his son, Sa-do.

In search of inspiration, rock band "Excellent Souls" - Lee Min Ki (Lee Hong Ki), Kang Hyeok (Park Min Woo), Yoo Han Cheol (Lee Si Un) - goes on hiatus deep in the countryside. To their surprise, the village elder is none other than Kang Yoon Hee (Honey Lee), a zippy woman who's not only the town's first female leader, but also the youngest. She also just so happens to be bandleader Min Ki's first love. Amidst a rural backdrop, these scrappy rockers take stock of what stirs their passions - both musical and romantic.

Set in 1926 during Japanese colonial rule, this Korean period romance follows Heo Su A, a 17-year-old maid sold into servitude by her impoverished family. After dreaming of a wounded whale, she discovers Kang Ui Hyeon, a severely injured independence activist, washed ashore and secretly nurses him back to health-risking her life in the process. However, a failed assassination attempt by his comrade leaves Su A mute. Determined to seek revenge, Su A travels to Gyeongseong, where she becomes entangled in the dangerous world of resistance fighters. Meanwhile, Ui Hyeon-an educated elite and covert operative skilled in espionage and codebreaking-struggles with his identity as the son of a pro-Japanese judge while dedicating himself to the independence movement. As their paths intertwine, both are drawn deeper into a fight that tests their loyalties, pasts, and hearts.

Time periods decades apart. Each night, for a few fleeting hours, time overlaps and allows them to meet. What begins as confusion turns into a quiet, growing connection as they share their lives across the divide. As links between past and present begin to surface, they realize their encounters may be part of something larger-and unchangeable. With only the night to belong to each other, they must decide whether to hold on to a bond that cannot exist in the light of day.

Jung Ba Reum's planner might be full, but one thing she desperately needs in her diary is a date. When she is lured into joining a programming club by her friend's hot coworker, it looks like there might be hope for her. But will her inexperience lead to her downfall? And why does she keep running into his bad-tempered friend instead?

The story is centered on the rise and fall of two major industrialists in South Korea during the second half of the 20th century, depicting the life and times of the founders of Hyundai and Samsung groups.

22 contestants live together for two weeks in a simulated village that consists of two opposing societies. At the end of the game, only one of the two societies will survive: a society where a strong leader dictates, or a society where decisions are made by the public.
5 famous pastry chefs from Southeast Asia team up with 5 Korean celebrities to form 2-member teams and create innovative K-snack-based desserts in an intense survival competition.

A survivor game in which contestants aim to solve the Main Code to allow them to escape a room. Clues to deciphering the Main Code are found by solving hidden puzzles throughout the set with theme-setting rooms. The first to escape the room will move on to the next round and be given a clue to the Main Code at the start of the next round. The last four contestants left in the room must compete in the Last Code match wherein they must solve a final puzzle, and the last to do so is eliminated.

primary_title: Galapagos: The Edge of the World

plot: Sung-Woon is the self-centered director of a fashion company. After falling in love with a goodhearted single-mother, Sung-Woon reevaluates his priorities in life.
Set in the year 1258 during the Goryeo Dynasty, as a 30-year war with the Mongols nears defeat, a convoy sets out on a perilous mission to recover the sacred national relic, the Avalokitesvara Jewel.
High school soccer star Gong Chan quits the team, becomes an outcast, but finds motivation when a new girl arrives. Threatened with expulsion, he vows to attend class and pursue his crush.
Top-7 contestants of "King of Singers" face off in a fierce competition against the Top-7 contestants from "Trot Girls Japan".

A young boy, whose life and family has been destroyed by new media, gets adopted by a family in a rural area after being found lost at sea. He conceals his past for 13 years. But then the girl he loves, a reporter, finds out the truth.

A single mom who has been only focusing on making money and achieving fame is suddenly finds out she has a time-limited life. All her life, she has been neglecting her only son so she now wishes to spend the rest of her lifetime for him finding his family before she leaves.
